title: Bienveillance, gentillesse dans un cadre magnifique, dans le centre de Vienne. Nous recommandons !
positive_comment:
Le choix de cet hôtel était lié à son emplacement central, avec un accès direct au centre historique et au transport en commun pour accéder aux différents sites touristiques à l'extérieur du centre ville.
Le personnel était bienveillant et très réactif. 
La chambre, y compris la salle de bain, étaient totalement comme sur les photos. Notre espace était très propre et très agréable.
Le petit-déjeuner, chouette moment de la journée, avec aussi un très bon accueil.
Nous avons aussi profité du bar rooftop de l'hôtel, averc une décoration hivernale très cocoon.
Bref, nous nous sommes sentis très bien accueillis.  Le service et nos demandes de bons "tuyaux" étaient vraiment au top.

title: Slightly faded traditional grand hotel
positive_comment: Location. Grand hotel style. Room was large. Welcoming reception. Good breakfast
negative_comment: Quirky HVAC and dated lighting controls. Poor room supplies. Needs updating.

title: Comfortable hotel with friendly staff in a convenient location.
positive_comment: The hotel is well-placed to reach the centre of Vienna and to visit other attractions by train. The room was well-appointed and comfortable.
negative_comment: There was no kettle in the room and only small coffee cups. It took a while for housekeeping to bring a kettle but we go there in the end. No larger cups were available in the room. The room was serviced fairly well although it was not hoovered over the 4 nights we were there.

title: A surpresa de Viena
positive_comment: A localização do hotel é excelente. Os funcionários são muito simpáticos e proporcionaram um ambiente fantástico em todas as interações. O rooftop do Lamée é excecional. Ótimas bebidas e atendimento muito simpático. O restaurante que faz parte do grupo, também é muito bom. Quando voltar um dia, certamente repito a experiência de ficar aqui hospedada.
negative_comment: Não tenho criticas negativas a fazer, apenas uma observação, o quarto poderia ter estores, mas os blackout funcionam bem.

title: Excelente localização para conhecer Viena
positive_comment: Quarto de tamanho generoso. Camas confortáveis. O pequeno-almoço é bom.
negative_comment: O facto de o hotel funcionar em 2 edifícios é estranho. No Topazz há quartos, a recepção e o pequeno-almoço. No edifício em frente (Lamée) há quartos e um rooftop. Por causa do rooftop a porta da rua do Lamée está aberta e é normal entrarem clientes do rooftop para o elevador que dá acesso aos quartos e que funciona sem cartão. O acesso ao corredor dos quartos só ocorre com cartão. A casa de banho é aberta.

title: Excelente estadia
positive_comment: Quarto confortável. Bom pequeno almoço. Boa localização. Funcionários super simpáticos

title: Excelente localização.
positive_comment: A excelente localização é pequeno almoço dentro do esperado. Bons quartos e limpeza.
negative_comment: O facto de no último dia não nos terem mudado as toalhas de banho e o RoofTop apesar de indicarem que ia reabrir no verão maninha-se fechado.

positive_comment: Very central to U1. Clean towels every day. Provided iron and board when asked
negative_comment: No extra pillows when asked

positive_comment:
We stayed in the Lamee building. Our suite was gorgeous- much bigger than we expected. Our beds were super comfortable, and we loved the robes that were left for us to use. 
The bathroom had dual sinks, a bath and a really great shower. We also appreciated the external blinds that can be put down to totally block the light from the large windows. 
The hotel staff we met when checking in/out at Topazz were all lovely.
negative_comment:
We thought that the €33 charge for breakfast was very high, so went to get breakfast elsewhere. 
We went for a drink on the Lamee rooftop but found service very slow. We stood for a long time before being shown to a table, and it then took around 10 or 15 minutes for us to be served. We also thought that €17 for a cocktail was pretty expensive- higher than most places in London, where we live.

title: I would recommend this hotel happily as ticked all our boxes
positive_comment: Very central location, handy for sights, restaurants and local transport. The breakfast was excellent, good quality and cooked to order. Pleasant staff and comfortable, spacious room.

title: Location is Superb.
positive_comment: The room gives a posh vibes. Location is superb. The staff upon check-in was very nice. That I can leave the luggage’s for sometime. Breakfast staff were so attentive.Thankful.
negative_comment:
Noise from neighbors doors during day time. 
Upon check-out, some unfriendly energy from the receptionist. Perhaps They’re already tired.

title: Great stay! Great location! Photogenic room!
positive_comment: Great location, very comfy! Felt like home and very clean! We loved the circle windows and the sound proofed rooms! They also provided very good coffee and a complementary wine and chocolate! The shower products were exceptional and they restocked everyday!
negative_comment: The shower mixer valve was broken and couldn’t be adjusted to the right temperature but it was sufferable. The staff was overall disengaged and  apathetic and some members of the staff were  a bit rude.. except the cleaning ladies who were very polite.

positive_comment: I would like to express my heartfelt gratitude for the wonderful experience I had at your hotel. Your location is absolutely perfect, and I was deeply touched by the attentive and caring staff. I also want to extend a special thank you to everyone who sent gifts for our anniversary. It made our stay truly unforgettable.

title: Delightful stay in a beautiful hotel in the heart of Vienna, just next to the Opera.
positive_comment: This is a beautiful hotel, in particular the larger rooms facing the Ringstrasse.  No issues with noise as the double glazing is very effective.  The gym is fairly small, but the sauna and steam room are excellent and very luxurious.  The breakfast is extensive and delicious.  Staff are super friendly and helpful.  Would highly recommend, although it isn't cheap so needs to either be a treat (or on expenses!)

The room was a bit old but spacious and comfortable with the necessary amenities. The concierge was also friendly and helpful
negative_comment: The reception was efficient but not top notch considering the status of the hotel. They had little information on the restaurants beyond basics for arrangements during the holiday period. Communication with the cleaning staff seemed limited.

positive_comment: Perfect breakfast, location, hotel staff, room size, comfort of the bed.

title: Un séjour parfait et exceptionnel dans un hôtel d une très grande qualité
positive_comment: Tout était exceptionnel. J’y ai fêté mes 50 ans , nous avons été surclassés dans une suite grandiose, cela m a fait énormément plaisir. Le personnel est très sympathique et très professionnel, a l ´écoute et aux petits soins . Nous avons mangé dans tous les restaurants de l’hôtel qui sont d’une très grande qualité surtout le 1870 , incroyable ! Et le Japonais excellent ! Le sushi bar aussi ouvert toute la journée, très bon et très pratique.. nous remercions tous le personnel et particulièrement notre femme de chambre , le serveur Dénis de la brasserie, le chef et serveur du restaurant 1870 , le cuisinier du sushi bar , le masseur Léon , les pianistes , la conciergerie et les bagagistes Dragan et Srecko , les réceptionnistes et Vanessa .. pour nous avoir fait passer un séjour merveilleux… Le petit déjeuner est extraordinaire, tout est frais et énormément de choix ! Nous avons hâte de revenir …

positive_comment: Eindrucksvolles Ambiente, schnelle Fahrstühle, guter Service, gutes Frühstücksbuffet bezogen auf die Speisen

Keine Selbstbedienung bei Kaffee,der dann dünn, lauwarm mit kalter Milch serviert wurde. Auf Nachfrage wurde mir besserer Kaffee mit heißer Milch gebracht. Keine echten Säfte. Nur Fruchtsaftgetränke aus dem Automaten. 
Zimmer:
Schön anzusehen mit zahlreichen Mängeln. Der lose Duschkopf im Bad und der kaputte Sessel im Zimmer wurden zügig ausgetauscht bzw repariert. Im Badezimmer unterschiedliche Leuchtstärken der Lampen, bemalte billige Pressspannplatte als Verkleidung unter dem Waschbecken, was bei 5 Sternen ein No go ist. Antiquierte Klimaregulierung und am schlechtesten waren die beiden Einzelbetten, die auf Rollen waren, welche trotz Fixierung nicht gehalten haben und man vorsichtig mit den Betten umgehen musste, damit diese nicht durch den Raum wandern. Die Kopfkissen ohne wirkliches Füllmaterial und die Matratze zu weich.
Der Hocker im Zimmer war auch durchgesessen. Keine Steckdosen am Bett. Nur unten hinter dem Schrank für die Lampen. 
Das Bad ist sehr klein. Duschen nur über eine abgesenkte Badewanne möglich. In diesem 5 Sterne Hotel gibt es keine separate Dusche in dem 35 qm Zimmer. 
In der Pflege und Wartung ausbaufähig, dann wäre es auch für uns eine Option, dahin wiederzukommen.

title: Wunderbar
positive_comment:
Unser Aufenthalt im Hotel The Leo Grand war in jeder Hinsicht außergewöhnlich. Wir haben uns vom ersten Moment an rundum wohlgefühlt. Das Interieur wurde mit außergewöhnlich viel Liebe zum Detail gestaltet – jedes Element wirkt sorgfältig ausgewählt und harmonisch aufeinander abgestimmt. Wunderbar.
Das Personal ist überaus zuvorkommend, herzlich und professionell, sodass man sich als Gast wirklich geschätzt fühlt. Besonders beeindruckt hat uns die einzigartige Lage sowie die faszinierende, traditionsreiche Geschichte des Hauses. 
Wir sind positiv überrascht und kommen sehr gerne wieder.

title: Ein wunderbares Boutique Hotel im Herzen Wiens
positive_comment:

Die Einrichtung ist stilvoll, gehoben und sehr geschmackvoll mit Liebe zum Detail, man fühlt sich sofort wohl.
Das Frühstück war ausgezeichnet: hochwertige Auswahl, frisch und liebevoll präsentiert.
Besonders positiv ist uns das sehr zuvorkommende und freundliche Personal aufgefallen – aufmerksam, professionell und herzlich.
Insgesamt ein rundum gelungener Aufenthalt. Wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen.
negative_comment: Nur die Raumdüfte waren für unser persönliches Empfinden teilweise etwas intensiv.

positive_comment: Perfekte Lage und ideale Grösse. Wunderbares Beispiel um typisches Wien zu erleben. Wunderschönes Zimmer geschmackvoll eingerichtet und hochwertiges Bett. Was will man mehr?

I recently had the pleasure of staying at this charming hotel in Vienna, and I must say, it exceeded all my expectations. From the moment I arrived, the staff made me feel incredibly welcome and well taken care of. The rooms were spotless, beautifully decorated, and offered all the comforts one could ask for during a stay in this stunning city.

A special shoutout goes to Ahmed Magdy, whose professionalism and kindness truly stood out. Ahmed went above and beyond to ensure my stay was smooth and enjoyable.

title: Wonderful
positive_comment:
We had a wonderful stay at Almanac Vienna and truly enjoyed our experience from start to finish. From the moment we arrived, we received a warm welcome and the front desk staff were extremely friendly, welcoming, and helpful throughout our stay.

We stayed in a one-bedroom suite with a living room, and the space was excellent — very comfortable and perfect for a family. The bathrooms felt luxurious, and overall everything about the hotel was beautiful, elegant, and well maintained.
negative_comment: The only small downside was that we stayed on the 8th floor, and although our suite was supposed to face the garden, the windows were quite high, so we ended up seeing more of the sky than the garden view. Other than that, everything was lovely and we had a beautiful experience. Highly recommended!

title: Comfortable stay at a great location. Would stay here again
positive_comment:
The location was superb -  walking distance to the places we wanted to see (Albertina, Museum Quarter, Stephansdom etc) so we ended up walking everywhere without having to rely on public transports. 
A bonus for us as the hotel is situated next to a park so there was some greenery around us. We even took a stroll across the park to see the daily life of the local residents. Many good restaurants within 5-10 mins from the hotel to choose from or even supermarkets. 
Room was spacious, clean & quiet. Bed, pillows & temperature were very comfortable.  Lovely floral arrangement in the lobby, very nice touch.
negative_comment:
The bathroom used glass panels so it was somewhat awkward when one of us was using this facility, so beware especially when you stay with a friend. But we worked it out.
Reception could be more welcoming though. They seemed soooo professional that the check-in & out experiences lacked warmth. It's not that we dislike this but it was just so robotic. Sorry!!! Anyhow, I would definitely stay here again as the so many pros outweigh this.

title: Perfect city break
positive_comment: Very central , beautiful decor , clean and staff were very attentive
negative_comment: The spa area is very small

title: Incredible hotel, loved staying here and hope to return very soon!
positive_comment: Gorgeous hotel! Our room (park view suite) was incredible, the bed was out of this world! The staff were so friendly, helpful, accommodating and generally amazing! Extremely impressed!
negative_comment: Nothing, it was one of the best places we have ever stayed in. It was a total treat to stay here!

title: High tech rooms
positive_comment:
Location is great, within walking distance to the majority of sights.
The rooms are very well equipped with modern technology, tea and coffee facilities, complementary bottled water replaced daily.
negative_comment: The only thing I could criticise was that when we went down to the bar there wasn’t any vibe but we did go post lunch so maybe later in the day would have more buzz. Room service strudel was poor in comparison to others about the city.

I guanciali sono entrambi morbidissimi: potrebbe essere utile offrire due consistenze diverse.

positive_comment:
Posizione spettacolare

negative_comment: Nulla

title: Tutto estremamente meraviglioso, la città è bellissima e maestosa , l’accoglienza è stata ottima
positive_comment: Bellissima ed elegante , il personale molto gentile e disponibile
negative_comment: Nulla

positive_comment:
Siamo stati coccolati, il check in non è il solito luogo chiassoso ma un salottino confortevole.
Siamo stati accompagnati in camera, dove ci hanno spiegato tutte le peculiarità e servizi disponibili,con un'ottima bottiglia di vino bianco come benvenuto.
La camera è meravigliosa e tutti gli accessori sono proprio da 5 stelle.

Anche la sala per la colazione sembra un giardino d'inverno , dove i caldi colori della tappezzeria ti rilassano .

Infine la sua posizione, ottima perché ci troviamo in zona centralissima e non abbiamo avuto bisogno dell'auto per spostarci.
Pulizia e attenzione di tutto il personale, la posizione é speciale
Appena siamo entrati in stanza siamo rimasti con la bocca aperta.. tutto curato nei minimi dettagli non mancava nulla , spaziosa perfetta

title: Charming Hotel nell’elegante Vienna
positive_comment: Posizione centralissima. Non credo ci sia posizione migliore. Colazione alla carta di gran livello. Camera spaziosa e con grande charme. Disponibilità e cortesia dello staff. Mini bar e spazio Lounge (con relativi servizi) completamente gratuiti

title: Albergo meraviglioso
positive_comment: Albergo meraviglioso, accogliente, personale super cortese, posizione perfetta, colazione eccellente, camera bellissima. Ho solo pensieri positivi.

title: Cinque stelle meritatissime
positive_comment: Colazione meravigliosa, camera pulita e silenziosa nonostante fosse al primo piano. Letto comodo e Arredamento moderno su struttura antica.

title: Per assaporare in pieno l'atmosfera magica ed elegante di Vienna
positive_comment: Posizione stupenda davanti alla fermata della metro e ideale per fare qualunque tipo di escursione. Personale super gentile e disponibile, con camere funzionali ed eleganti. Dotate di ogni confort, anche in bagno.

title: Da ripetere sicuramente
positive_comment: Struttura eccezionale, posizione ottima, prezzo buono.

title: Hotel confortevole in ottima zona. Vienna è bellissima. Siamo stati d’incanto. Ritorneremo sicuramente

positive_comment:
Ho avuto il piacere di soggiornare all'InterContinental Vienna by IHG e l'esperienza è stata assolutamente straordinaria. Il personale è stato incredibilmente accogliente e disponibile. . La stanza era impeccabile: pulita, elegante e confortevole, con ogni dettaglio curato per garantire il massimo del relax.
La vista sulla città di Vienna era mozzafiato. Un soggiorno perfetto che consiglio vivamente a chiunque voglia scoprire il cuore di Vienna con il massimo del comfort e della qualità.
Hotel accogliente ed elegante a due passi dal centro di Vienna. Accoglienza impeccabile e letto comodissimo.
La posizione abbastanza centrale, la ricchezza della colazione e le stanze.
La hall dell'albergo, la colazione e la cortesia del personale.

title: An elegant and refined hotel with outstanding service and a perfect location in Vienna.

The spa and wellness area add an extra touch of relaxation, and the overall atmosphere of the hotel feels sophisticated and welcoming.
negative_comment: Everything was excellent, no significant downsides

title: Fabulous staff, fabulous location

title: Hotel meraviglioso in centro di Vienna
positive_comment: The stay was fine, nothing to complain about the cleanliness, location, spa, courtesy of the staff, restaurant, and bar, with the truly superb Italian staff.
negative_comment: The only truly disappointing thing is the breakfast organization. I'm used to 5-star hotels, even without a buffet, but everything is really poorly organized. There's a lack of supervision to coordinate the timing, which is absolutely unacceptable. More than an hour for breakfast, almost like lunch, is unacceptable by Ritz Carlton standards. In addition to the timing, there were also oversights and shortages of products to serve at the table. This feedback is not a criticism in itself, but a suggestion to improve a truly weak point of this wonderful hotel.

Everything was so nice. We really like it all the staff was very nice and polite.

title: 5* Luxury experience in central London

title: A very good impression for the first time visitors to Vienna.

Excelente ubicacion. Los amenities del hotel son increibles. Todos los dias te regalan 2 botellas de vini de cerveza, bebidas, jugos, etc. Personal muy agradable.

positive_comment:
Lage zentral, kann alles zu Fuß erreichen, U-Bahn Nähe genial, !sehr sehr sehr freundliches Personal am Empfang/Rezeption und an der Tür! Auch im Restaurant☺️
Obwohl mitten in der Stadt SEHR RUHIGE LAGE, Zimmer Richtung Innenhof SEHR ruhig-TOP, KÜHLSCHRANK GEFÜLLT und im Preis inkludiert-> sehr nette Überraschung
Lage, Freundliches Personal, Preis-Leistung Spitze
negative_comment: Tagsüber fallen laufend Türen laut in die Schlösser

positive_comment: Hervorragende Lage! Sehr engagiertes und aufmerksames Personal!

title: Ein Hotel mit Stil, Persönlichkeit und echter Gastfreundschaft – wir kommen sehr gerne wieder!
positive_comment:
Unser Aufenthalt im The Guesthouse Vienna war rundum großartig. Besonders beeindruckt haben uns die Liebe zum Detail, der individuelle Service und die echte Herzlichkeit, mit der man hier empfangen wird. Die Unterstützung bei der Organisation von Blumen sowie die lieben, persönlichen Glückwünsche haben unserem Aufenthalt eine ganz besondere Note verliehen.
Ein besonderer Dank geht an Mladen und das Team für ihre außergewöhnliche Freundlichkeit, Hilfsbereitschaft und Professionalität. Ihr Engagement macht den Unterschied und bleibt in bester Erinnerung.

title: Romantisches Innenstadt Hotel
positive_comment: Wir waren schon öfter im The Guesthouse Vienna und wir sind jedes Mal sehr zufrieden. Das Zimmer ist sehr gemütlich und großzügig. Wir liebe es am großen Fenster zu sitzen und ein Glas Wein zu trinken.
negative_comment: Wir können nichts negatives sagen.

title: Ein angenehmes Hotel … sehr nettes Personal … an einer Top-Lage in Wien.
positive_comment: Das Frühstück war nicht inkl., aber die Auswahl im Restaurant war gut und preislich ganz in Ordnung.

title: Ein tolles Hotel zum Wohlfühlen für einen wunderbaren Kurzurlaub!
positive_comment: Das Hotel liegt perfekt für Shopping und Kultur. Alle Getränke der Minibar sind im Preis inkludiert. Im Restaurant kann man sehr schön im Freien in der Sonne sitzen. Die Einrichtung der Zimmer ist wunderbar stylisch.
negative_comment: es war alles sehr gut.

title: Absolut empfehlenswert!
positive_comment: Super Lage, sehr nettes und aufmerksames Personal und ausgezeichnetes Essen!

title: wir waren echt begeistert, kommen gerne wieder.
positive_comment: Die Lage des Hotels ist perfekt, auch die Garagierung des Autos, die Aussicht vom Zimmer auf Albertina und Oper ist super, besonders angenehm ist, dass das Frühstück individuell serviert wird.
Wir haben uns in diesem Hotel wunderbar aufgehoben, sehr aufmerksam bewirtet, bedient uns sehr wohl gefühlt

title: Excellent hôtel en centre-ville de Vienne
positive_comment:
Hôtel en centre-ville près du musée Albertina et à 35mn à pieds de la gare centrale 
Grand chambre très bien décorée avec coin banquette table basse et coins tapis près des fenêtres avec vue sur la place et le musée Albertina 
Très grande salle de bain avec baignoire et WC séparé 
Lit grand et ferme
Chambre disponible des 12h

title: Muy lindo hotel. Muy bien ubicado y muy buenos servicios
positive_comment: La habitación es muy grande y cómoda. La relación precio servicio es perfecta

Wir haben unseren 45.ten Hochzeitstag gefeiert. Von der Ankunft bis zur wegfahrt war das Personal bis auf zwei Ausnahmen sehr nett und zuvorkommend. Sie haben alle sehr freundlich gelacht und einem jeden Wunsch erfüllt. Besonders hervorheben möchten wir Normen und Davide.  Das Essen im Steakhaus war sehr gut. Das Essen jedoch im Pastamare war aussergewöhnlich. Wir durften ein acht Gang Menü geniessen was uns vollkommen begeisterte. Der Spa Bereich inkl. Massage ist jederzeit weiter zu empfehlen. Das Hotel ist sehr zentral gelegen und das Zentrum zu Fuss erreichbar.
negative_comment: Beim Nachtessen im Steakhaus lief für uns die falsche Musik. Wien hat sehr schöne Musik und da sollte man nicht unbedingt BUM BUM Musik laufen lassen. War Störend. Als der Kellner uns beim Frühstück beraten hat, ist die zuständige Chefin vom Service gekommen und hat uns unterbrochen und den Kellner weggeschickt was eines Ritz Carlton unwürdig ist. Das Frühstück war sehr gut. Wir bevorzugen jedoch ein Büffet zum selber bedienen. Die Wartezeiten waren zeitweise sehr lang. In der Bar bediente uns eine Dame die zuvor mit jemandem Deutsch gesprochen hat und mit uns nur Italienisch und Englisch obwohl wir erklärten, dass wir nur Deutsch sprechen. Die Speisekarten sind vordem Haus und im Restaurant nicht identisch.

title: Perfekt für einen entspannten Wientrip
positive_comment:
Das außerordentlich gut geschulte und extrem aufmerksame Personal. Das war wirklich besonders!
Die absolute Nähe zu allen Sehenswürdigkeiten war außerdem sehr hilfreich. Fast alle Sehenswürdigkeiten waren zu Fuß erreichbar.
negative_comment: Nichts zu meckern.

title: Exklusives Stadhotel in perfekter Lage um die Stadt zu erkunden.
positive_comment: Unglaublich freundliches und motiviertes Personal, reichhaltiges Frühstück, sehr schöne Zimmer

title: Toll.
positive_comment: Essen im Pastarame war super. Frühstück ohne Buffet ist gewöhnungsbedürftig und braucht Zeit. DIe angebotenen Speisen sind exzellent.

title: Gut gebettet in Wien.
positive_comment: Das Hotel liegt günstig am Ring, das Centrum und viele Sehenswürdigkeiten sind fussläufig zu erreichen. Wir wurden sehr freundlich empfangen und wurden upgegradet. Das Personal war professionell, hilfsbereit und überaus entgegenkommend. Das Zimmer bot viel Platz, das Bett war bequem. Die Kapazität des  Frühstücksraum drohte in morgendlichen Spitzenzeiten nicht auszureichen. Das Frühstück ließ  kaum einen Wunsch offen. Abends in der Bar herrschte eine angenehm entspannte Atmosphäre. Die kreativen Cocktails wurden, in dem eigentlich männlich dominierten Beruf, ausschließlich von Frauen gemixt. Alles in allem war der Aufenthalt im Ritz eine schöne Erfahrung.
negative_comment: Die Restaurants, die Lounge neben der Rezeption und die Bar hätten gerne etwas längere Öffnungszeiten haben können.

title: Wiener Luxushotel, ausgerichtet auf internationale Klientel mit hohem Preisniveau
positive_comment: Das Zimmer war sehr ruhig und ausgestattet mit allem, was man braucht (und nicht braucht- zwei Festnetztelefone). Die Betten waren bequem, das Bad feudal. Möbel und Tapeten sind schon etwas in die Jahre gekommen. Alles war sehr sauber.
negative_comment: Ich hatte mich nach einem early check-in erkundigt (13.30 Uhr). Die Antwort des Hotels war „upon availabiliy“. Wie ich nun weiss, heisst das soviel wie: Vergiss es! Mein Zimmer konnte ich um 14.58 Uhr beziehen. Die Hotelsprache ist englisch; viele Mitarbeiter auch am Empfang sprechen kein Deutsch.

title: Sehr gut - wir kommen wieder.
positive_comment: Die Freundlichkeit des Personals am Morgen war sensationell.

title: Geil!!!!!
positive_comment: Groß, tolle Betten, Bar sehr gut ausgestattet, supersauber!!!

Besonders hervorzuheben ist das außergewöhnliche Frühstück mit bestem Service.
In Summe ein top geführtes Hotel mit einem rundum Wohlgefühl. Einfach empfehlenswert!

title: Aufenthalt war gelungen.
positive_comment: Das Zimmer war luxuriös, wunderbare Betten und ein tolles Bad. Personal war sehr freundlich. Anfragen und Wünsche wurden sofort erfüllt.
negative_comment:
Frühstücksbuffet finde ich besser, da man das Frühstück selber zusammenstellen kann. In diesem Fall war man auf 3 oder 4 
Varianten beschränkt. mehr Bioprodukte wären angebracht.

title: Cortesia professionalità e servizio di livello assoluto
positive_comment: Cortesia , professionalità e servizio top ! Consigliato
negative_comment: Mancava il bidet in camera

title: SUPER CONSIGLIATO
positive_comment:
struttura centrale, bellissima, molto pulita e staff eccezionale. nota di merito allo staff. disponibile, preparato e gentile, in particolare Katarina, alla reception. una persona splendida. 
colazione buonissima. buffet completo e menù molto buono.
negative_comment: stanza piccola e un po' datata ma dotata di tutti i comfort.

title: piacevole permanenza
positive_comment:
tutto bene tranne che all'arrivo le valigie date in consegna al personale sono state recapitate 50 minuti dopo tanto che siamo dovuti uscire senza prendere il necessario dai bagagli. la camera se pur pulita abbiamo trovato una bottiglia vuota a terra (dimenticata dallo staff). critiche che si possono fare solo perchè l'hotel è un eccellenza viennese e ci si aspetta il massimo. staff gentilissimo. personale del bar di altissimo livello. struttura bella 
palestra ben strutturata. posizione ottima. colazione di alto livello.
negative_comment: camera, affaccio interno senza vista e rumoroso (motori esterni). non siamo riusciti ad abbassare la temperatura interna della camera.

title: Festeggiare un compleanno in maniera indimenticabile
positive_comment:
Un nome, una garanzia.
Mi preme solo sottolineare l'estrema gentilezza e la cordialità di ogni singola persona dello staff con cui ho avuto il piacere di interagire.
E la qualità sopraffina del ristorante Dstrikt, con una scelta di tagli di carne di prima categoria, peraltro cucinati alla perfezione.
negative_comment: Il flaconcino di collutorio nel bagno era già aperto. Un peccato veniale.

positive_comment: Staff gentilissimo ed estremamente attento agli ospiti.

title: I have been to many European cities. But Vienna and The Guest House tops them all. Truly magical.
positive_comment:
I looked at many Hotels. As grand as they were, just not for me. The Guest House was perfect in every way and every detail.
From the moment I arrived I knew this was where I wanted to be. Perfect…. Location, room, staff… everything.
I cannot recommend this hotel enough.
negative_comment: Only one small thing. I like 2 firm pillows to sleep on.

title: Molto PET FRIENDLY!! Bravi
positive_comment: La struttura si trova in una posizione centrale, ma estremamente silenziosa. Noi viaggiavamo in compagnia del nostro cagnolino e sono stati veramente gentili nel far trovare al nostro arrivo cuccia,ciotola e premietti nelle nostra  bella stanza e senza nessun costo aggiuntivo (incredibile!). Davanti all’hotel c’è un parco piccolino, dove puoi far correre il tuo cane liberamente  e vi garantisco che è un lusso. Visto che nei parchi difficilmente i cani possono entrare. Anche se devo ammettere che sparse nella città ci sono varie  aree dedicate ai nostri cagnolini. Il mini bar gratuito , acqua , coca cola,  aranciata, succhi di frutta e vino sempre disponibili.  Lo staff gentile. Il ristorante sempre affollato , sia di giorno che di sera. Ovviamente abbiamo apprezzato anche noi la loro cucina..colazione super! Cena fantastica. Prenotate sempre.
negative_comment: Forse una cosa c’è . Non mi è piaciuto il comportamento di uno dei camerieri, in quanto pur avendo riservato la sera prima un determinato tavolo al  maitre di sala. Il cameriere della mattina , pur essendoci scritto RISERVATO ed apparecchiato per Due, ha detto che non poteva darci quel tavolo perché era per 5 persone . Noi senza parole. Mi ha dato molto fastidio. Peccato perché il Maitre di Sala era veramente una persona professionale. Mentre il cameriere neanche un po’. Pazienza

title: A beautifully clean, fabulously located weekend!
positive_comment:
The staff were all lovely and very attentive. The room
was cleaned a couple of times a day, and a lovely turn down service when they bring you pillow spray. The free mini bar was a huge bonus!

title: Super établissement
positive_comment:
Pour notre 1ere fois à Viennes,  nous avons adoré notre week-end dans cet hôtel.

La chambre était spacieuse, propre et agréable. Quelques petits détails de finition à revoir dans la salle de bain mais c'était très bien.

Le restaurant a une jolie décoration, simple et chaleureuse. Les plats sont généreux et bons.

Le personnel est très chaleureux et avenants. Ils ont été très attentionnés envers nous car ils ont remarqués que c'était l'anniversaire de mon fiancé (petite surprise avec une part de gâteau). Et une grosse surprise pour ma part car ils ont aidé mon fiancé à faire sa demande de mariage dans le restaurant. Un gros merci pour votre bienveillance 🧡

L'établissement est bien localisé soit au cœur du centre ville. Donc parfait pour accéder à tous les commerces à pied. 

Je vous recommande fortement sans hésiter 👍🏾

positive_comment: L'emplacement est vraiment très central. Le personnel de l'hôtel avenant et souriant. La chambre de luxe, face au parc, avec tout le confort. À disposition gratuitement, les petites bouteilles d'eau, de bière, même de vin,  et autres, une attention vraiment très appréciée.

Le soir, l’hôtel offre l’apéro dans le petit salon, ce qui permet de rencontrer et d’échanger avec les autres voyageurs et le personnel de l’hôtel. Un plus indéniable!

positive_comment: Nous avons passé un séjour magnifique à l’Anantara Vienna. L’hôtel est splendide, avec une architecture historique et un intérieur élégant mêlant charme classique et confort moderne. La chambre était spacieuse, calme et très bien équipée. Le service a été impeccable, avec un personnel toujours attentionné et souriant, prêt à rendre notre séjour agréable. L’emplacement est idéal pour découvrir Vienne à pied. Une adresse que nous recommandons vivement pour profiter pleinement de la ville dans un cadre raffiné et reposant.

title: Classy hotel.
positive_comment: Everything about the stay was excellent; from check-in to check-out. Really friendly staff at reception, the bar, the spa and the concierge(s). Special mention to the lady who is bar manager.  The huge main lobby with the bar and cafe, with high ceilings has a grand feeling.  Had the best Bloody Mary at the bar and even the proverbially challenged "hotel club sandwich" was special, with chicken that was cooked after we ordered.  The room had everything one would expect from a classy hotel. From the shower to the lighting switches, to the night light to the room temperature, to the quality of the bed and linen was top.  This is obviously a very well managed hotel and I would highly recommend it to anyone who wants a memorable stay in a town with so much to offer.

Le bar/restaurant du riz-de-chaussée face à la réception est chic et chaleureux, il est très agréable de s'y poser pour prendre un verre, lire un livre ou y travailler. Je n'ai malheureusement pas eu le temps de diner à l'hôtel ou de profiter su SPA et la piscine mais je pense que cela devait être parfait, ce sera pour une autre fois ! Je conseille vivement cet hôtel 👍

In addition to the timing, there were also oversights and shortages of products to serve at the table. This feedback is not a criticism in itself, but a suggestion to improve a truly weak point of this wonderful hotel.

title: A consistently excellent stay, made special by the professionalism and warmth of the staff.
positive_comment:
We usually stay at the Do&Co Hotel whenever we visit Vienna, and once again our experience was excellent. The staff is consistently kind, attentive, and helpful.
Niko, whom we met during our very first stay, truly stands out. He is always extremely professional, friendly, and polite, and by now he knows us well — always asking if we need anything and making us feel genuinely welcome.
During our last stay, we also met Shahim, who assisted us with our luggage. He was very kind, efficient, and helpful, and his support was greatly appreciated.
Our stay was exactly as expected — comfortable, smooth, and pleasant. The hotel’s location is excellent, and the staff’s professionalism and warmth are what make us return every time.

title: Un lugar donde el lujo se siente como hogar!
positive_comment: Nuestra estancia en el Hotel Sans Souci Wien fue simplemente perfecta. Desde el primer momento, el personal nos recibió con una amabilidad que marca la diferencia. Cada detalle del hotel refleja elegancia y confort: la habitación era amplia, luminosa y decorada con un gusto exquisito. El spa y la zona wellness son un auténtico oasis para relajarse después de recorrer Viena. El desayuno, variado y delicioso, es el mejor comienzo para un día en esta ciudad maravillosa. Nos vamos con el corazón lleno y la certeza de que volveremos. ¡Gracias por hacer que nuestra experiencia fuera inolvidable!

La cama, además, era comodísima.

En general, un hotel totalmente recomendable. ¡Definitivamente volvería!

title: A consistently excellent stay, made special by the professionalism and warmth of the staff.
positive_comment:
We usually stay at the Do&Co Hotel whenever we visit Vienna, and once again our experience was excellent. The staff is consistently kind, attentive, and helpful.
Niko, whom we met during our very first stay, truly stands out. He is always extremely professional, friendly, and polite, and by now he knows us well — always asking if we need anything and making us feel genuinely welcome.
During our last stay, we also met Shahim, who assisted us with our luggage. He was very kind, efficient, and helpful, and his support was greatly appreciated.
Our stay was exactly as expected — comfortable, smooth, and pleasant. The hotel’s location is excellent, and the staff’s professionalism and warmth are what make us return every time.

title: Ein luxuriöser Aufenthalt, der seinen Preis hat aber keine Wünsche offenlässt.
positive_comment: Unser Aufenthalt im Hotel Sans Souci Vienna war wirklich etwas Besonderes. Man merkt in jedem Detail, dass dieses Hotel höchsten Ansprüchen gerecht wird – vom stilvollen Ambiente über den exzellenten Service bis hin zum gesamten Komfort, der wirklich keine Wünsche offenlässt. Für diesen Aufenthalt mussten wir verhältnismässig sehr viel Geld in die Hand nehmen, aber rückblickend war es ein ganz besonderes Erlebnis, das sich absolut gelohnt hat.
negative_comment: Eigentlich gab es nichts zu beanstanden. Natürlich ist das Preisniveau hoch, und man muss bereit sein, für diese Qualität entsprechend zu investieren. Dafür bekommt man jedoch ein Hotelerlebnis, das in jeder Hinsicht aussergewöhnlich ist.

title: Hotel precioso en Viena
positive_comment:
El hotel es una maravilla, realmente precioso, con una estética cuidada y muy bien situado. 
Las habitaciones que reservamos (Suite Sisi e Imperial) eran enormes, con camas y almohadas cómodas y estaban contiguas, lo que nos agradó mucho para estar juntos los 4. El personal del hotel resolvió nuestras dudas y peticiones, fue muy agradable y gentil. Diariamente revisan y reponen agua y café en las habitaciones.
El desayuno nos encantó, el bar del hotel tiene los precios del alojamiento, si bien la calidad es alta.
negative_comment:
Nos gustó todo, sin embargo quizás podrían mejorar algo los baños para estar completamente a altura de la Suite, al igual que la cantidad y calidad de los amenities que proporcionan. 
La suite Imperial no tenía balcón, pensé por las fotos que si había, quizás al estar en la planta primera esta Suite en concreto no disponía de balcón, por lo demás, todo genial.

title: Volveremos!!

title: Classy hotel.
positive_comment: Everything about the stay was excellent; from check-in to check-out. Really friendly staff at reception, the bar, the spa and the concierge(s). Special mention to the lady who is bar manager.  The huge main lobby with the bar and cafe, with high ceilings has a grand feeling.  Had the best Bloody Mary at the bar and even the proverbially challenged "hotel club sandwich" was special, with chicken that was cooked after we ordered.  The room had everything one would expect from a classy hotel. From the shower to the lighting switches, to the night light to the room temperature, to the quality of the bed and linen was top.  This is obviously a very well managed hotel and I would highly recommend it to anyone who wants a memorable stay in a town with so much to offer.

title: Absolutely exceptional stay.
positive_comment:
Absolutely exceptional stay.! 
The staff were incredibly attentive and genuinely caring from the moment I arrived. They even kindly allowed me to stay beyond the official check-out time, which I truly appreciated.
The level of service is impeccable — truly top class. Every detail reflects professionalism and sincere hospitality.
The location is perfect, right in the heart of Vienna. The hotel itself is a magnificent historic building that beautifully reflects the elegance and spirit of the city. You can truly feel the atmosphere of Vienna throughout the interiors, the ambiance, and the overall design.
Breakfast is fantastic with an excellent selection and outstanding quality.
I highly recommend this hotel. Everything here is truly of the highest level, and I’m very grateful to the entire team for their genuine care and outstanding service.
I would absolutely choose to stay here again when I return to Vienna.

The hotel is exceptionally beautiful in terms of location  and amenities. The staff are friendly especially a receptionist named Ahmad, who was very kind.

I recently had the pleasure of staying at this charming hotel in Vienna, and I must say, it exceeded all my expectations. From the moment I arrived, the staff made me feel incredibly welcome and well taken care of. The rooms were spotless, beautifully decorated, and offered all the comforts one could ask for during a stay in this stunning city.

A special shoutout goes to Ahmed Magdy, whose professionalism and kindness truly stood out. Ahmed went above and beyond to ensure my stay was smooth and enjoyable.

title: Our first time in Vienna and at the Anantara ,both exceeded our expectations   in every way,looking

If only every Business had such a professional manager ,she really does love her job !!

title: Absolutely exceptional stay.
positive_comment:
Absolutely exceptional stay.! 
The staff were incredibly attentive and genuinely caring from the moment I arrived. They even kindly allowed me to stay beyond the official check-out time, which I truly appreciated.
The level of service is impeccable — truly top class. Every detail reflects professionalism and sincere hospitality.
The location is perfect, right in the heart of Vienna. The hotel itself is a magnificent historic building that beautifully reflects the elegance and spirit of the city. You can truly feel the atmosphere of Vienna throughout the interiors, the ambiance, and the overall design.
Breakfast is fantastic with an excellent selection and outstanding quality.
I highly recommend this hotel. Everything here is truly of the highest level, and I’m very grateful to the entire team for their genuine care and outstanding service.
I would absolutely choose to stay here again when I return to Vienna.

title: Exceptional.
positive_comment: Everything. The location, staff, rooms & facilities were exceptional. The hotel staff went above & beyond for us and were by far the friendliest. The rooms were beautiful & large. The hotel was in the heart of everything! HIGHLY recommend.
My stay was truly special – everything was wonderful. Many thanks to the team for being so kind and attentive during my entire visit.

title: Just wonderful!
positive_comment: This was one of the best overall hotel experiences we have ever had in Vienna! The staff was so polite, the service was impecable! The rooms are highly equiped for a perfectly relaxing stay!

title: superb, beautiful, luxurious
positive_comment: The hotel met all our expectations. Superb decoration, clean, a sense of luxury at every turn. We have been to many 5* hotels but Park Hyatt Wien is at the top. The staff is very friendly, especially the gentleman at the entrance, the Concierge and the gentleman at the reception. The breakfast is made of top quality ingredients and looks perfect. See you again soon!

positive_comment: El hotel es precioso, por dentro y por fuera y está perfectamente ubicado. La habitación, muy cómoda, bien decorada y amplia. El desayuno, maravilloso!! Pero lo mejor, la atención que recibimos antes de llegar y durante nuestra estancia.

title: Esplendor en Viena
positive_comment: Habitación maravillosa, en dos plantas, con una distribución muy agradable. El baño es de los mejores que he disfrutado. La ubicación es inmejorable. Es un lugar muy especial. Tiene un lujo muy único; es un hotel muy privado.

title: Muy buena estancia
positive_comment:
El hotel es muy bonito. La habitación está muy bien. La cama es gigantesca, muy cómoda. El baño muy bien con bañera y ducha. Buen gel, champú y crema suavizante. 
El desayuno es a la carta, no hay buffet, cosa que no me gustó mucho. 
El spa es correcto. Piscina, sauna y un baño turco pero no hacía mucho calor dentro. 
La comida del servicio de habitaciones muy buena.
negative_comment: Detallitos: no hay espejo de cuerpo entero en la habitación. La luz del baño no es ideal para maquillarse, no hay mucha luz la verdad. El agua de la piscina estaba para mí gusto fría. Fui un día al spa pero no me dieron ganas de repetir. Y no hay desayuno buffet.

title: Eccezionale esperienza
positive_comment: Bellissimo palazzo storico, centralissimo. Personale gentilissimo, preparato. Ristorazione molto buona. Spa piacevole, con la piscina accessibile ai bambini. Camere spaziose. Ottimo servizio transfert da aeroporto. Taxi sempre disponibili.
negative_comment: Acqua della piscina leggermente fresca per i miei gusti. Servirebbe avere una rampa di accesso dalla hall alle ascensori per i passeggini, anche se il personale è molto disponibile. Maggiore varietà di piatti al ristorante per chi resta più giorni.

title: Eleganza viennese
positive_comment:
Il Park Hyatt Vienna sorge maestoso su una bella piazza del centro storico, incorniciato da un’atmosfera vivace e raffinata. Gli ambienti, ristrutturati con grande attenzione ai dettagli, coniugano il fascino dell’architettura classica con il comfort contemporaneo.
La posizione è ideale: situato nel cuore di una zona elegante e ben frequentata, l’hotel permette di raggiungere a piedi in pochi minuti le principali attrazioni culturali della città, dai sontuosi palazzi ai musei più famosi.
Le camere, spaziose e arredate con gusto.

title: Für mich ein absolutes Top-Hotel in Wien
positive_comment:
Das Gebäude an sich ist aus meiner Sicht schon toll, insbesondere innen detailreich und überlegt gestaltet. 
Diesen Eindruck hatte in von der Lobby über den Lift bis ins Bad (übrigens gigantische Duschhandtücher von hoher Qualität) meines Zimmers. 

In gleicher Weise positiv habe ich den Kontakt mit den Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern erlebt. Freundlich, kompetent, hilfsbereit. Bestimmt einer guten Schulung geschuldet aber meiner Ansicht nach auch Ergebnis eines guten Auswahlverfahrens.  

Gym fand ich gut für ein Hotel. 

Frühstück für meinen Geschmack sehr besonders aufgrund der originellen Vielfalt und der Präsentation. 

Preis/Leistung jedenfalls angemessen.

title: Ottima scelta
positive_comment: Posizione perfetta per esplorare a piedi il Centro e per dormire in tranquillità.Moderno, opere di arte contemporanea, staff giovane, molto garbato e tutti english speaking. Ho avuto un upgrade in una Suite al nono piano, confortevole,luminosa e panoramica, bel bagno,  letto comodo ma mancava uno spazio per aprire la valigia e/o per riporla. Se fossimo stati in sue sarebbe stato un ingombro fastidioso.  Camere con domotica semplice ed intuitiva, minibar molto scarso. Buon menu colazione che il sabato e la domenica è possibile fino alle 14, magnifico! Bar interno di qualità e Spa molto gradevole. Nel complesso un'ottima scelta.

title: Das Almanac Palais Vienna ist ein wunderschönes, stilvolles Hotel mit hervorragendem Service, traumhaften Zimmern und ei
positive_comment:
Unser Aufenthalt im Almanac Palais Vienna war rundum hervorragend. Wir hatten ein wunderschönes, großzügiges und sehr komfortables Zimmer im eleganten Maisonette-Stil mit zwei getrennten Betten – genau wie gewünscht. Alles war äußerst sauber und gepflegt. Besonders gefallen hat uns der schöne Blick auf den Park.

Das gesamte Team war jederzeit sehr hilfsbereit, aufmerksam und freundlich, sodass wir uns sofort willkommen gefühlt haben. Auch die Lage des Hotels ist perfekt: mitten im Herzen von Wien, mit vielen Sehenswürdigkeiten, Restaurants und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten direkt in der Umgebung. Alles war schnell und bequem erreichbar.

Wir können dieses Hotel mit voller Überzeugung immer wieder weiterempfehlen und würden jederzeit gerne wiederkommen
negative_comment: Es gibt nichts auszusetzen, es ist alles perfekt

title: Ich komme wieder!

title: Phantastische Lage in schönem Gebäude, aber nicht 5-Sterne
positive_comment: Perfekte Lage für ein Kultur-Wochenende und Stadtbesichtigung. Nettes Personal, gute Frühstücks- und Poolzeiten. Alles sehr sauber. Schönes Gebäude.
negative_comment: Ursprüngliches Zimmer (Deluxe Almanac) hatte eine Verbindungstür zum Nachbarzimmer, durch die man jedes Wort der Nachbarn gehört hat (absolutes No-Go in 5-Sterne-Niveau), das Personal war allerdings sehr bemüht und und hat ermöglicht, das Zimmer zu wechseln. Glastür Bad/ Toilette gewöhnungsbedürftig. Frühstück: Bestellung von Frühstücksgerichten in vorgegebenen Kombinationen ermöglicht keine Flexibilität, verschiedene kleine Dinge zu kosten..

positive_comment: Top Service an der Rezeption, Lage war perfekt, Frühstück war super, ruhige Zimmer, sehr freundlicher Concierge, schönes Interieur
negative_comment: Service beim Frühstück war freundlich jedoch komplett chaotisch. Wir sind draußen gesessen und mussten oft ewig warten bis jemand vom Servicepersonal gekommen ist. Oftmals war jemand an Tischen nebenan um Bestellungen aufzunehmen jedoch auf Handzeichen wurde gar nicht geachtet. Viele Bestellungen kamen dann raus und das Personal wusste nicht für welchen Tisch die Bestellungen waren, ein no-go für Frühstück zu dem Preis. Ebenfalls kein Salz und Pfeffer auf den Tischen. Großes Verbesserungspotential bei der Koordination.

title: Schönes, künstlerisches Hotel ohne adäquates Frühstück
positive_comment: Sehr schön eingerichtetes Hotel, viel Kunst, sehr hochwertige schöne Badezimmer, guter Pool- und Spabereich, top Lage, hochwertige Zimmer, 2x täglich Zimmerservice.
negative_comment: Frühstück. Es gab nur so vorgefertigte Cafe-Haus-Frühstück-Elemente, überwiegend mässige Discounter-Qualität, kaum Möglichkeit der Individualisierung, viele Frühstück-Standard-Produkte gab es gar nicht, Personal überfordert (vor allem bei Abweichungen zu ihren Standards ("haben wir nicht, kennen wir nicht"). Im Vergleich zu den schönen und variantenreichen Frühstück-Buffets, die in 4-Sterne und 5-Sterne in der ganzen Welt üblich sind, eine echte Enttäuschung. Im Vergleich zu der unterdurchschnittlichen Qualität sind die überdurchschnittlichen Preise fürs Frühstück nicht angemessen, teilweise geradezu grotesk. Ich bezahle gerne mehr, dann muss man aber auch das Niveau anheben. Anspruch und Wirklichkeit klaffen hier weit auseinander.

positive_comment:
Ich möchte eine besonders hilfreiche Concierge Katharina E. hervorheben. 
Sie hat uns in einer medizinischen ( Notfall-) Situation souverän, tatkräftig, mit Übersicht und empathisch unterstützt! Wir sind Ihr so dankbar dafür!!

title: Super Hotel in Top Lage
positive_comment: Super tolles Hotel direkt am Stadtpark (trotzdem sicher). Das Frühstück war der Hammer,  noch nie so ein tolles Frühstück gehabt. Das Zimmer war sehr modern und sauber. Auch der Pool war sehr sauber und schön. Die Mitarbeiter sind sehr nett und hilfsbereit. Im der Nähe des Bahnhof Wien Mitte mit direkter Verbindung zum Flughafen. Gute Anbindung an die Öffis und die Stadtrundfahrtbusse. Alles in der Altstadt ist fußläufig erreichbar.
negative_comment: Es fehlen Haken, um die Bademäntel aufzuhängen. Auch wäre es schön,  wenn man das Fenster zum Lüften öffnen könnte.

Accueil et concierge parfaits, centre spa avec piscine/jacuzzi, hammam et sauna inclus dans le prix de la chambre.
Le bâtiment ancien est magnifique et les chambres spacieuses avec domotique très fonctionnelle.
C'est sans hésitation que nous choisirons à nouveau cet hôtel pour un futur séjour à Vienne.

positive_comment: Personnel très aimable et à l'écoute. L'hôtel est très bien situé, à proximité des points touristiques et transports en commun. La suite était parfaite et il y avait même des petites attentions pour notre fils (lit bébé, peignoir à sa taille, soins Petit Prince). Merci au personnel pour l'accueil.
negative_comment: Le petit déjeuner à la carte est très bien mais restreint et soumis au fait de devoir demander à chaque fois ce que l'on souhaite. Un buffet d'appoint (comme certains jours à priori) serait parfait pour venir compléter.

title: Stilish luxury Boutique Hotel in the heart of Viena
positive_comment:
Da localização, do edifício e decoração do Hotel.
Cams ótimas e gigantes, ótimo pequeno-almoço

title: Perfeita.
positive_comment: Atenção total, enviaram bolo pra comemorarmos dia aniversário casamento e um cartão lindo.

title: a wonderful place in the heart of Vienna
positive_comment: Everything îs special. Friendly staff. Cleaning. Great breakfast.

title: Wonderful
positive_comment:
We had a wonderful stay at Almanac Vienna and truly enjoyed our experience from start to finish. From the moment we arrived, we received a warm welcome and the front desk staff were extremely friendly, welcoming, and helpful throughout our stay.

We stayed in a one-bedroom suite with a living room, and the space was excellent — very comfortable and perfect for a family. The bathrooms felt luxurious, and overall everything about the hotel was beautiful, elegant, and well maintained.
negative_comment: The only small downside was that we stayed on the 8th floor, and although our suite was supposed to face the garden, the windows were quite high, so we ended up seeing more of the sky than the garden view. Other than that, everything was lovely and we had a beautiful experience. Highly recommended!

positive_comment: Welcoming staff who’s always ready to help with whatever you need, cleanliness, the daily housekeeping service, the location is just perfect
negative_comment: I was looking forward to try the restaurant but it turned out it was closed at the time we stayed there, a little disappointed! We tried the lobby on our last night there - had drinks and bar snacks and honestly not was expecting for a relais and chateaux property! The spa was cute but very small and the pool water was cold!

title: Absolutely exceptional stay.
positive_comment:
Absolutely exceptional stay.! 
The staff were incredibly attentive and genuinely caring from the moment I arrived. They even kindly allowed me to stay beyond the official check-out time, which I truly appreciated.
The level of service is impeccable — truly top class. Every detail reflects professionalism and sincere hospitality.
The location is perfect, right in the heart of Vienna. The hotel itself is a magnificent historic building that beautifully reflects the elegance and spirit of the city. You can truly feel the atmosphere of Vienna throughout the interiors, the ambiance, and the overall design.
Breakfast is fantastic with an excellent selection and outstanding quality.
I highly recommend this hotel. Everything here is truly of the highest level, and I’m very grateful to the entire team for their genuine care and outstanding service.
I would absolutely choose to stay here again when I return to Vienna.

title: Exceptional.
positive_comment: Everything. The location, staff, rooms & facilities were exceptional. The hotel staff went above & beyond for us and were by far the friendliest. The rooms were beautiful & large. The hotel was in the heart of everything! HIGHLY recommend.
My stay was truly special – everything was wonderful. Many thanks to the team for being so kind and attentive during my entire visit.

title: Just wonderful!
positive_comment: This was one of the best overall hotel experiences we have ever had in Vienna! The staff was so polite, the service was impecable! The rooms are highly equiped for a perfectly relaxing stay!

title: superb, beautiful, luxurious
positive_comment: The hotel met all our expectations. Superb decoration, clean, a sense of luxury at every turn. We have been to many 5* hotels but Park Hyatt Wien is at the top. The staff is very friendly, especially the gentleman at the entrance, the Concierge and the gentleman at the reception. The breakfast is made of top quality ingredients and looks perfect. See you again soon!
negative_comment: everything was great

title: One of the best hotel in Vienna. High standards, very good balance between efficiency and smile of employees, a place to
positive_comment: Good location, nice and monumental building, very positive and friendly vibe. Helpfull team with a special note for Karim from Concierge. One of the best I ever met.

title: Una estancia de 10
positive_comment:
Todo, la ubicación, instalaciones, atención del personal.
Todo perfecto

Excellente hotel, muy ubicado.
Personal muy atento, instalaciones de primera ;)

title: Excelente hotel! Súper recomendable
positive_comment: El servicio, la atención, la calidad del desayuno, la ubicación, el spa, la hospitalidad. El tamaño de la cama, nos tocó el último piso con una ventana en el techo que se podía ver el cielo todo manejado desde controles automáticos.
negative_comment: Faltaba caja de pañuelos de papel tissue en el baño. Una tontería insignificante. Pero algo debía poner.

title: Un hotel apropiado para visitar Viena
positive_comment: La atención en recepción y la correcta organización de los espacios en la habitación.
negative_comment: Estuve poco tiempo para encontrar cosas que no gustaran.

title: Una gran experiencia en familia en un excelente hotel
positive_comment:
Muchas gracias a todo el personal del hotel, todo estaba perfecto !!! 
Como siempre, volveremos en nuestro próximo viaje a un Relais & Châteaux

title: Hotelazo para volver
positive_comment: Hotelazo pequeño pero precioso. Personal amabilísimo, habitación impecable, ducha fantástica, un restaurante impresionante. Sitio inmejorable. Vamos, un hotel de 5 estrella con todas las de la ley. Enhorabuena.
negative_comment: Realmente todo estuvo bien. No hubo nada que no me gustase.

title: Un bonito hotel cerca del corazón de Vienna
positive_comment: Muy bonito hotel en excelente ubicación. Tiene un restaurante y un bar donde sirven riquísimos snacks y bebidas. La habitación suite muy amplia, el baño cómodo, la cama confortable. Excelente ducha.
negative_comment: El desayuno. Este servicio necesita estar mejorado. El menu a la carta no funciona; la selección de comidas es muy pobre y los camareros no cumplen con la atención. El tiempo de espera exageradamente largo y la calidad de comida deja mucho que desear.

title: Hotel perfecto!
positive_comment: La ubicación es perfecta: a un paso de la Ópera! El personal maravilloso, muy simpáticos!! (Aunque deberían aprender un poquito más de español jaja)
negative_comment:
El masaje que me di fue tan horrible que pedí q no me lo cobraran. Me salí a los 15min pq en vez de un masaje relajante me estaba poniendo de lo nervios. Menos mal que el personal es increíble le y al final no me lo cobraron. Pero la misma chica le hizo la manicura a mi hija y para cobrar más de 100€ solo tenía 7 colores (y muy de abuela...) 
A la hab le sobraba algún mueble o le faltaba espacio... jiji

title: Imperdible parada en Viena
positive_comment: Hotel espectacular. Ubicación cerca de todo, casi frente a la ópera, se puede llegar caminando a todos lados. El personal es súper atento, todo el tiempo se preocupa por dar un buen servicio, se ocupan de recomendar y reservar restaurantes, taxis, etc. El hotel cuenta con un bistro y un restaurante que sirven excelente comida. Muy bien desayuno, a la carta. La habitación muy cómoda y silenciosa, vidrio triple a la calle. Totalmente insonorizada. Buen gimnasio con maquinas de última generación y spa. Me encantó también toda la ambientación del hotel, muy moderno y con detalles artísticos. Un placer alojarse allí.
negative_comment: Nada!

positive_comment: El confort de la habitación y la atención del personal. Excelente
negative_comment: En la habitación había algún tipo de insecto que provoca picaduras que duran varios días

positive_comment:
Todo fue muy bien . Tamaño de habitación,  comodidad de la cama y excelente baño y ducha.
No hay nada que no me haya gustado.

title: Graz una pequeña joya.
positive_comment: Desayuno fabuloso. Cerca de la estación a20’ del centro.Limpieza

title: Excellent stay we will definitely return
positive_comment: Hotel excellent and in great central location for shopping and museums etc. All staff are excellent and very helpful. We used the Park Hyatt car transfer from the airport which was very efficient.
negative_comment: The only minor issue we had was during breakfast on one morning. The room was busy and staff seemed a bit overwhelmed. Our order was wrong so we sent it back for a replacement. In total we waited 40 minutes for our breakfast. We noticed others had similar issues on that day too.

title: Very pleasant
positive_comment:
The hotel is great, the room comfortable, bright, nice view, excellent spa and swimming pool with good opening hours which allows to enjoy it before and after work while on a business trip. 

The only thing that I really missed was a full size mirror in the room - to check your look as a whole before leaving the room.
negative_comment: The only thing that I really missed was a full size mirror in the room - to check your look as a whole before leaving the room. This made it inconvenient for me to walk into the shower in my dress shoes cause that's where the most full size  mirror is.

title: Wonderful stay in beautiful city.
positive_comment: Great location. Lovely room and bathroom but very expensive. Fabulous breakfast in beautiful dining room ( included in expensive room rate)
negative_comment: Only small defect - ridiculously small size tea cups provided in room!

title: One of the best city hotels in Europe
positive_comment: Fantastic place, very convenient location. Great food and amazing service

title: The perfect stay for my fiancées birthday!
positive_comment: Suite was superb and decor inside stunning, very grande. Staff friendly and welcoming.

title: Highly recommended. Check the pictures of the place, they are not fictional :)
positive_comment: The most incredible staff ever! Perfect! Everywhere, on every floor.
negative_comment: Maybe some more attention to the shower head in the bathroom and the fridge in the kitchen by the technicians :)

title: The softest bedding (and most exercise in a hotel) of my life!
positive_comment:
Free mini bar, a bottle of champagne, and snacks ALL included. I chose the no breakfast option which was a mistake. Their turndown service was just subtle enough that I almost missed it until I noticed the tiny details, which made it all the more spectacular. Although the bedding appears a bit dated, the sheets and duvet are a dream to lay with. I didn't want to leave the bed, until I realized what I had left downstairs...

The hotel is built inside a palace and I became lost more than once, ending up in random stairwells, dark cellars, someone's wedding, and gorgeous rooms with massive chandeliers.

Highly recommend one of the tours in the wine cellar- you will be led through a history of Vienna, the palace and sample some lovely wines (Im sure) or Champagnes (which I did).
negative_comment:
The stairs in the room are a pain, as everything is spread out and forgetting one thing upstairs means heading back down to retrieve it
it was
a workout
                           located in the
                           quiet part of town
                           adds to the work-out 
(due to the distance of the
sights cause you gotta walk there)

Would have been helpful to have the breakfast items along with the cost listed, I may have avoided the astronomical charge.

title: Staying in a real palace, feels great!
positive_comment: Breakfast was great, little bit slow service but great food and ambience. Room was great and spacious and well equipped too
negative_comment: Spa zone - the water in the swimming pool was cold, the sauna didn’t work

title: Unforgettable
positive_comment: Everything was absolutely perfect, Staff, location, interier.
negative_comment: Only two small details: 1) moderd black glas TV table does NOT suit to this antient building with other antient furniture. 2) our room smell little bit , because of toilet pipe.

title: Perfekt für Stadtaufenthalt
positive_comment: Schönes geräumiges Zimmer. Sehr gute Restaurants. Tolle Lage.
negative_comment: Pflegeprodukte im Bad. Grösse Bad.

title: Comfortable stay at a great location. Would stay here again
positive_comment:
The location was superb -  walking distance to the places we wanted to see (Albertina, Museum Quarter, Stephansdom etc) so we ended up walking everywhere without having to rely on public transports. 
A bonus for us as the hotel is situated next to a park so there was some greenery around us. We even took a stroll across the park to see the daily life of the local residents. Many good restaurants within 5-10 mins from the hotel to choose from or even supermarkets. 
Room was spacious, clean & quiet. Bed, pillows & temperature were very comfortable.  Lovely floral arrangement in the lobby, very nice touch.
negative_comment:
The bathroom used glass panels so it was somewhat awkward when one of us was using this facility, so beware especially when you stay with a friend. But we worked it out.
Reception could be more welcoming though. They seemed soooo professional that the check-in & out experiences lacked warmth. It's not that we dislike this but it was just so robotic. Sorry!!! Anyhow, I would definitely stay here again as the so many pros outweigh this.

title: Perfect city break
positive_comment: Very central , beautiful decor , clean and staff were very attentive
negative_comment: The spa area is very small

title: Incredible hotel, loved staying here and hope to return very soon!
positive_comment: Gorgeous hotel! Our room (park view suite) was incredible, the bed was out of this world! The staff were so friendly, helpful, accommodating and generally amazing! Extremely impressed!
negative_comment: Nothing, it was one of the best places we have ever stayed in. It was a total treat to stay here!

title: High tech rooms
positive_comment:
Location is great, within walking distance to the majority of sights.
The rooms are very well equipped with modern technology, tea and coffee facilities, complementary bottled water replaced daily.
negative_comment: The only thing I could criticise was that when we went down to the bar there wasn’t any vibe but we did go post lunch so maybe later in the day would have more buzz. Room service strudel was poor in comparison to others about the city.

title: Would definitely recommend
positive_comment: Beautiful rooms, excellent location, spa facilities great

title: Great location and excellent hotel...at a price...
positive_comment: Amazing location and great room size. As always expectations were adjusted to the hotel category and some of them where not met. Really good hotel, pricy but good
negative_comment: Air conditioning machine  was crazily noisy, 5.5€ for a bucket of ice?!, 5.5€ for a glass of milk...this is how it goes. Not wrong but it is what it is

positive_comment: Very clean, the staff were always friendly and helpful, the breakfast was excellent, and the staff were more than wonderful, always attentive to our halal food and very respectful. The hotel is truly amazing, and the location is excellent, offering easy access to transportation. Thank you so much; our trip was perfect thanks to you.

title: Loved the hotel, the location, the service.
positive_comment:
We had a lovely four night stay at the Amauris.
Really lovely hotel. We had three rooms to accommodate our family. Each of the rooms were wonderful. Plenty of room and the hotel had put us in rooms close together on the same floor.  We could not fault the rooms. They were spotlessly clean and housekeeping was excellent. 
We found all the staff to be very pleasant and very attentive. 
Breakfast was excellent with plenty of choice and made fresh when ordered. We could not fault the choice and quality of the food at breakfast.
negative_comment:
We were staying as a family - six adults, one child and one infant. 
Unfortunately, we found the dining options to be a bit limited and therefore only had breakfast in the hotel which was a shame. 
Anyone considering a stay at the hotel should check the dinner menu to check it meets with your tastes.

positive_comment:
To each member of the wonderful Amauris team I wanted to express my sincere gratitude for your outstanding service during our stay.
The attention to detail and friendly demeanor of your team members exceeded my expectations. I was especially impressed with how you 
surprised our daughter with a celebration of her birthday with a cake and a beautiful singing by the staff members.
The food was amazing. 
The beds are comfortable. 
The location is perfect. 
Your hotel will definitely be the destination on our next visit to Vienna. 
Thank you for making our experience so memorable.
Sincerely
M. Alterki

title: I definetly recomend The Amauris Hotel
positive_comment: As a frequent traveller to Vienna, I have been truly impressed with The Amauris Hotel. I spent two nights at the property, and thanks to the excellent service and professionalism received, they were for sure memorable and relaxing. Upon arrival, I got an amazing upgrade to a beautiful room. Attention to detail in this hotel is for sure on another level. The stylish and yet cosy design, ultra-comfortable bed, exceptional cleanliness level, relaxing spa and atmosphere, delicious and high-quality food, and highly trained staff members definitely left a positive impact on me. I was really able to relax in the best possible way during my 3-day gateway to Vienna. I definitely recommend The Amauris Hotel and for sure will come back again soon.

title: A most memorable stay.
positive_comment: The staff are amazingly helpful. The rooms are spacious and well appointed.

title: Einfach hervorragend!
positive_comment: Lage sensationell. Frühstück für mich verbesserungsfähig.
negative_comment: Frühstück

title: Hier gastiert man wahrlich königlich - ein unvergesslicher Aufenthalt.
positive_comment: Alle unsere Erwartungen wurden übertroffen. Vom Check-In an waren alle MitarbeiterInnen des Hotels mehr als hilfsbereit und zuvorkommend. Unsere Mutter wurde zu Ihrem runden Geburtstag vom Hotel mit Blumen und Pralinen beschenkt. Die Zimmer waren ein Traum! Vom den Designermöbeln bis hin zur Qualität der Bettwäsche - eine Klasse für sich! Vor allem das Frühstück war exquisit!  Wenn man ein ganz besonderes Erlebnis sucht, ist man hier mit Sicherheit bestens aufgehoben.
negative_comment: Da fällt mir beim besten Willen nichts ein.

title: Wien auf höchstem Niveau - hat natürlich seinen Preis.
positive_comment: Das Coburg ist eine edle und aufwändig restauriertes Residenz mit grosszügigem Charme und luxuriös gestalteten Zimmern. Die Lage ist sehr gut gelegen, nahe des Zentrums und der Sehenswürdigkeiten von Wien. Das Frühstück bietet eine grosse Auswahl und wird gemäss Wunsch des Gastes frisch zubereitet. Das Essen im hauseigenen Restaurant "Silvio Nickol" bietet phantastische Genüsse auf höchstem Niveau. Das Personal ist äusserst bemüht und ausgesprochen freundlich.

title: Sehr eb
positive_comment: Sehr große Zimmer, zentrale Lage, außergewöhnlich gutes Frühstück
negative_comment: Keine Regenschauerdusche

title: Traumhafter Aufenthalt, mit jedem Luxus

title: Top Lage, zuvorkommendes Personal
positive_comment: Extrem höfliches, engagiertes und bemühtes Personal. Sehr gutes Frühstück.

positive_comment: Ein traumhaftes Hotel in der Innenstadt mit außergewöhnlich motivierten, zuvorkommenden und engagierten Mitarbeitern. Tolles Frühstück (kein Buffet). Hervorragende Betten. Schöner Spa-Bereich. Schöne Bar. Hervorragendes Gourmet-Restaurant.

title: Excelente hotel

negative_comment: Obwohl die Fenster sehr gut isoliert sind, hörte man von unserem Zimmer (1. Etage) aus den Verkehr auf dem Ring, vor allem die Strassenbahn. Meine Frau fand das Badezimmer zu klein. Die Bar hat uns sehr gut gefallen. Allerdings sind die Preise für gehobenen Wein und Champagner exorbitant teuer.

title: Wien von der besten Seite in einem perfekten Luxus

title: Soggiorno nel comfort e relax!
positive_comment: Posizione centrale, noleggio biciclette dietro l'hotel. Colazione a ala carta eccellente di qualità. Servizio e staff gentili ed efficienti. Avessimo in Italia dipendenti così che onorano il loro lavoro. Pulizia 10 e lode. Il cambio asciugamani la sera. Spa piccola ma molto riservata e soprattutto aperta fino alle 22 è un ottimo servizio per i clienti. La camera era superlativa, arredi nuovi, di stile e pulitissima. Prodotti Top al bagno Acqua di Parma. Booking ci ha dato l'upgrade gratuito per la stanza che aveva la vista proprio sulla via principale ed era molto luminosa. Abbiamo provato anche il ristorante, direi meritevole, cucina raffinata e buona. L'hotel ha fatto la differenza nel rendere piacevole a vacanza a Vienna.

title: una bellissima struttura in pieno centro
positive_comment: Struttura molto bella e confortevole in ottima posizione a pochi passi dal teatro dell’Opera e dalla zona pedonale che porta a Santo Stefano. Tram e metro a pochi passi. Camera molto confortevole, con ampia doccia e molti accessori.  La SPA è piccolina ma confortevole ed efficiente. La colazione, servita al tavolo nell’annesso ristorante con ampio e prelibato menu, è davvero un “must”. Personale molto gentile. Il ristorante per la cena serve piatti ricercati e molto elaborati nella presentazione ma … a prezzi “importanti”. È attivo però anche un servizio in stanza con menu diurno e menu notturno.
negative_comment: Il menu del ristorante (dove si propone un menu degustazione a 7 portate a €.190/persona bevande escluse) non è visibile in stanza e lo si scopre solo una volta seduti a tavola. Stanti i prezzi potrebbe risultare una sgradevole sorpresa. Il cibo poi, creativo e molto elaborato, non è esaltante. Il bar la sera (dopo teatro ad esempio) offre solo da bere con qualche oliva. Sarebbe stato gradito almeno qualche snack …

title: Loved the hotel, the location, the service.
positive_comment:

Really lovely hotel. We had three rooms to accommodate our family. Each of the rooms were wonderful. Plenty of room and the hotel had put us in rooms close together on the same floor.  We could not fault the rooms. They were spotlessly clean and housekeeping was excellent. 
We found all the staff to be very pleasant and very attentive. 
Breakfast was excellent with plenty of choice and made fresh when ordered. We could not fault the choice and quality of the food at breakfast.

We were staying as a family - six adults, one child and one infant. 
Unfortunately, we found the dining options to be a bit limited and therefore only had breakfast in the hotel which was a shame. 
Anyone considering a stay at the hotel should check the dinner menu to check it meets with your tastes.

positive_comment:
To each member of the wonderful Amauris team I wanted to express my sincere gratitude for your outstanding service during our stay.
The attention to detail and friendly demeanor of your team members exceeded my expectations. I was especially impressed with how you 
surprised our daughter with a celebration of her birthday with a cake and a beautiful singing by the staff members.
The food was amazing. 
The beds are comfortable. 
The location is perfect. 
Your hotel will definitely be the destination on our next visit to Vienna. 
Thank you for making our experience so memorable.
Sincerely
M. Alterki

title: I definetly recomend The Amauris Hotel
positive_comment: As a frequent traveller to Vienna, I have been truly impressed with The Amauris Hotel. I spent two nights at the property, and thanks to the excellent service and professionalism received, they were for sure memorable and relaxing. Upon arrival, I got an amazing upgrade to a beautiful room. Attention to detail in this hotel is for sure on another level. The stylish and yet cosy design, ultra-comfortable bed, exceptional cleanliness level, relaxing spa and atmosphere, delicious and high-quality food, and highly trained staff members definitely left a positive impact on me. I was really able to relax in the best possible way during my 3-day gateway to Vienna. I definitely recommend The Amauris Hotel and for sure will come back again soon.
It was the most perfect location imaginable for our short stay in Graz - close to everything but still quiet at night.

The pillows were not comfortable at all.
The fridge is far too small. For such a large and upscale hotel, the sauna is surprisingly tiny and feels cramped.
The location is good if you plan to walk to the center or travel by car, but hotel parking is outrageously priced — 40 EUR per day, which is honestly unreasonable. I strongly recommend using the Payuca app instead: you can park in the same building, level –2, for half the price. On weekends (Saturday/Sunday), parking costs only 14 EUR per day.

Das wurde zwar nicht ganz verständlich erklärt, die Mitarbeiterin war jedoch sehr freundlich und meinte, dass wir bei Problemen jederzeit wieder zur Rezeption kommen können, damit wir gemeinsam eine Lösung finden.

Très bien situé en ligne droite depuis la gare, à l'entrée du centre-ville. Personnel aimable et serviable. Locaux paisibles. C'est un peu moins confortable qu'un Ibis standard mais ça va parfaitement pour ce que nous étions venus faire : dormir.
negative_comment:
Aucun problème digne de ce nom à signaler. Je pourrais juste dire qu'au vu de la place disponible dans la chambre, il pourrait y avoir un peu plus de chaises notamment (en fait il n'y en a pas du tout, juste une sorte de tabouret), et aussi que je ne compris pas comment ménager une obscurité complète, c'est-à-dire comment fermer le store intégralement, il y avait quelques centimètres de fenêtre qui demeuraient forcément découverts. 
Je dois aussi signaler que le lit du dessus, pour l'éventuelle troisième personne, est réservé aux enfants de 6 à 12 ans, donc cette chambre ne convient pas à toutes les personnes voyageant à trois.

title: Un 5 stelle che a volte se lo scorda
positive_comment: Albergo moderno, nella parte nuova della città, vicino alla stazione. Camere molto ampie e belle, modernamente arredate con ricercatezza e stile, bagno confortevole con set di cortesia di Byredo. Ampia scelta di bar e ristoranti per mangiare o semplicemente prendere un caffè o un aperitivo. Garage a disposizione degli ospiti.
negative_comment: Il servizio non è all'altezza di un 5 stelle. Personale abbastanza scortese, soprattutto al check-in, le stanze vengono rifatte in fretta (e si vede) e non le preparano per la notte. Avremmo voluto prendere un aperitivo al roof garden, ma il forte odore di cibo (pesce) non era molto invitante. Peccato perché con un po' di attenzione sarebbe un ottimo albergo.

positive_comment: Struttura molto accogliente con personale sempre disponibile. Camere grandi e molto belle. Hotel vicino ai servizi pubblici che ti collegano alle maggiori attrazioni.

La zona è un po’ deserta.

Everything feels exceptionally clean and well maintained.
The staff is friendly, attentive, and genuinely pleasant.
Free minibar in the room — a very nice touch.
The room itself is extremely spacious and comfortable.
Heated bathroom floors are a huge plus — incredibly cozy and practical.
negative_comment:
The pillows were not comfortable at all.
The fridge is far too small. For such a large and upscale hotel, the sauna is surprisingly tiny and feels cramped.
The location is good if you plan to walk to the center or travel by car, but hotel parking is outrageously priced — 40 EUR per day, which is honestly unreasonable. I strongly recommend using the Payuca app instead: you can park in the same building, level –2, for half the price. On weekends (Saturday/Sunday), parking costs only 14 EUR per day.

Les chambres sont spacieuses et les lits confortables. Le verre offert à l’arrivée est un petit plus que nous avons beaucoup apprécié. 
Le parking proposé à proximité de l’hôtel était un peu cher à notre goût et nous lui avons préféré un parking relais gratuit accessible en transport en commun (P+R Weinzödl).

La chambre était grande. L'emplacement parfait pour visiter Graz. Il n'y a eu aucun problème pour parquer la voiture dans le garage souterrain et l'hôtel avait un local pour mettre le vélo en sécurité. Le petit déjeuner était dans une jolie salle, il était copieux.
