title: Ottimo per una visita a Graz
positive_comment:
Posizione centralissima a 30 metri dalla piazza principale. Atrio interno molto scenografico ed arredato con gusto.
Colazione ottima e molto bella la collocazione. Stanza molto ampia e tranquilla.
Parcheggio ampissimo nel silos adiacente, accesso all'Hotel passando dal centro commeciale. Prenotando in anticipo è possibile riservare un posto auto davanti all'Hotel.

positive_comment:

title: Sarebbe stato bello avere un altro giorno a disposizione

title: Soggiornare in centro a graz
positive_comment:
Posizione fantastica per visitare la
Città, in pieno centro, a due passi dal fiume, dal castello e dalla piazza del municipio. Comodissimo il
Parcheggio sotterraneo convenzionato, a due minuti a piedi. Accettano cani anche nella sala colazione, per noi è stato un plus. Albergo molto bello e curato, consiglio vivamente. Colazione buona con scelta tra dolce, salato, frutta e yogurt.

De qualquer consegui dormir pois o barulho não me incomoda tanto, mas o  quarto onde estive  é desaconselhado para quem se incomoda

positive_comment: 1) The location is ideal since the Palais-Hotel Erzherzog Johann is on the Hauptplatz, making it close to many of the major sites and restaurants. We loved our room as it was spacious with a great bathroom. 3) The staff is friendly, welcoming, and engaging.

title: Nice room near the bus station in Graz
positive_comment: This motel is near the bus station, it was easy to find it.The entrance hall with the reception and bar is very nice, I loved to spend time there. The personnel is very kind and helpful. The room is lovely, comfortable, clean.
negative_comment: The room is not cheap but prices are high for Christmas. I reserved a room with facilities for disabled people, there was a misunderstanding so initially they gave me a large room not for disabled, then I got a room for disabled. Wi-Fi was not working on my old phone, but it was working on the new mobile. I wanted to heat the bathroom and though the heating did not work, the personnel did not know what to do, then my boyfriend realised that the heater was working but only if the thermometer was on. I would recommend the manager to explain these things to the personnel, so that they can help the guests

title: Piacevole e accogliente!

title: Atmosfere natalizie a Graz
positive_comment:
La posizione centralissima e comoda per muoversi agevolmente anche a piedi. 
L’ordine e la estrema pulizia degli ambienti molto colorati e confortevoli. Ottima ed abbondante la colazione con prodotti vari e di qualità. Camera un po’ piccole ma comunque dotata di tutto il necessario per soggiorni brevi. Molto apprezzato  il servizio di custodia gratuito dei bagagli sia in entrata che in uscita.
negative_comment:
La vicina fermata del tram cittadino può dare un po’ di fastidio a chi ha il sonno leggero soprattutto nelle prime ore del mattino. Comunque è un piccolo dettaglio. 
Il vicinissimo parcheggio (Opera) per quanto  convenzionato con l’hotel e pagabile comodamente e direttamente alla reception  con un cospicuo risparmio, rimane  comunque abbastanza caro. (26 euro a notte).

positive_comment: Struttura in posizione centrale, pulita e molto ben curata. Personale cortese e disponibile.

title: Overall very good
positive_comment: Everything what I needed was there. The bed was comfortable and the room was clean and tidy.
negative_comment: Their was nothing what I didn't like.

title: Andate in questo hotel!
positive_comment: Fantastico hotel, perfetto per visitare Graz a piedi. Posizione centrale e strategica, con parcheggio convenzionato a soli due minuti di distanza. La nostra camera, con doppio affaccio sulla piazza, era davvero bellissima e molto confortevole. Colazione ottima, varia e di qualità. Un soggiorno che consiglio assolutamente.

title: Abbiamo trascorso una notte sola e come appoggio MO è sempre una garanzia per il rapporto qualità prezzo. Zone comuni se
positive_comment: Posizione strategica. Zone comuni arredate alla perfezione, camere con tutto ciò che serve.

title: Adorei salzburg e voltaria a fixar neste hotel
positive_comment: Hotel bem situado, relativamente ao centro mas para ir a pé fica um pouco longe, cerca de 2km +-, muito alternativo, bem decorado, limpo, arejado, espaçoso. Recomendo

title: Excelente relação qualidade preço
positive_comment: Excelente localização para conhecer o centro de Graz a pé, mas ao mesmo tempo com fácil acesso à rede de transportes! tem várias lojas convenientes mesmo ao lado! O pequeno almoço superou a minha expectativa pois variava ligeiramente de dia para dia e tinha opções para vegetarianos! Os funcionários foram super cordiais e solícitos para auxiliar! Boa relação qualidade/ preço! Com o Bónus da Maratona ter passado mesmo na rua ao lado!

They know what tastes good and it shows on their amazing breakfast! I don't mean they have anything fancy or unseen, but the stuff that matters, things like eggs, bacon, ham, cheese, pastries, bread, juices, coffee, all the sweet stuff and everything else is amazing here and 100% the real deal. The rooms were great too and location is top, so well worth it!

title: Super
positive_comment: The location of this hotel is perfect. We enjoyed their breakfast - a broad range of food and very tasty. The staff members were very kind.

title: A wonderful weekend enjoying a beautiful city.
positive_comment: Comfortable quiet room, wonderful location near city centre but in a quiet square.
negative_comment: There were nno problems.  We were very satifisfied.

positive_comment: Great location near the city centre and it's own private parking. The room was ok and the staff were friendly and helpful.

title: Very good hotel with lovely staff in a brilliant area.
positive_comment:
It was great to have a double room and a twin room next to each other. Everything was clean and comfortable and all the staff were friendly and helpful. There was lots of choice for breakfast and it was great to have the water dispenser near 
reception. We looked at the gym and sauna but didn't have time to use them. The location was perfect - close to the train station and also the town centre with all the interesting attractions, yet in a local area with a buzzing market, bars and restaurants.
negative_comment: Although the breakfast was good with plenty of variety, it seemed too expensive for what it was.

title: Would like to recommend it to friends.

title: Nice room near the bus station in Graz
positive_comment: This motel is near the bus station, it was easy to find it.The entrance hall with the reception and bar is very nice, I loved to spend time there. The personnel is very kind and helpful. The room is lovely, comfortable, clean.
negative_comment: The room is not cheap but prices are high for Christmas. I reserved a room with facilities for disabled people, there was a misunderstanding so initially they gave me a large room not for disabled, then I got a room for disabled. Wi-Fi was not working on my old phone, but it was working on the new mobile. I wanted to heat the bathroom and though the heating did not work, the personnel did not know what to do, then my boyfriend realised that the heater was working but only if the thermometer was on. I would recommend the manager to explain these things to the personnel, so that they can help the guests

title: Excellent, stylish hotel with a lively ambience
positive_comment: The staff, the location, the ambience, breakfast,...

title: Nice centrally located hotel

positive_comment:
Hôtel confortable situé à 10 minutes à pied du centre historique. Chambre très spacieuse et propre. Très bon petit petit déjeuner sous forme de buffet varié dans une salle agréable. Il y a même une terrasse pour les beaux jours.
Quelques places de parking sur réservation.
negative_comment: Mauvaise insonorisation, on entendait la télé du voisin. Ascenseur HS, ça arrive. Parking payant 15€ par jour.

positive_comment: Très agréable, avec possibilité de prendre le petit déjeuner sur la terrasse à l'extérieur. Présence d'un garage à vélo fermé à clé, ce qui est appréciable en ville.
negative_comment: L'ascenseur en panne, mais ce sont des choses qui arrivent.

title: Très bon hôtel de transistor pour motard
positive_comment:
Chambre très correct. Excellent accueil. Possibilité de garer une moto en parking sous terrain en toute sécurité.
Proche du centre ville.
Petit déjeuner de grande qualité.

title: Good value city centre hotel
positive_comment: We chose this hotel for its location half way between the train station and the old town.  Room was nice and quiet, on the courtyard side, with good WiFi and effective air conditioning, comfortable bed and recently refitted shower room. We didn’t try the breakfast. Helpful reception staff.
negative_comment: Be aware that the reception isn’t open 24/7. Tell them your arrival time and be very sure to take your key card with you when you go out from the hotel - you may need it to get back in through the front door.

title: Great facilities, staff and location.
positive_comment:
Everything was wonderful. Favourite place we stayed in Austria.
Staff were helpful, friendly and welcoming.
The facilities were great, the room was huge and it was really quiet at night for sleeping. The bed was huge and we had a little kitchen which was useful.
The shower was powerful with plenty of hot water. 
Just a 10 minute walk into the centre. Perfect!
negative_comment: Nothing!

title: Handy location near station for stop over

negative_comment: No

title: A good quality hotel in a great location.
positive_comment: A good quality hotel in a very handy location. Walking distance to the main train station and also to the centre of town for the restaurant area.
negative_comment: Can’t remember anything I didn’t like.

positive_comment: Location, in between old town and train station. Bus stops in front of the hotel, convenient for taking public transport.

title: I really enjoyed my stay at Hotel Drei Raben. The location is very convenient, everything was spotlessly clean, and the
positive_comment: Convenient location, cleanliness, polite and attentive staff.

title: A very pleasant and relaxing stay
positive_comment: Location, cleanliness, friendly staff, parking possibilities, welcoming dogs
negative_comment: There are no such things. Just one suggestion - coffee, tea, and number of cups could match the number of guests in the room.

positive_comment: Fantastic location between the train station and the old city. You can walk everywhere. Great supermarket nearby. Very clean. Fast internet. Friendly staff who let me check in early. I slept very well.
negative_comment: My only issue was that there was no kettle in the room to make a cup of tea. I was very jetlagged and wanted to make a cup of tea at 3am when I was wide awake. The night before I had asked the staff how to use the coffee machine downstairs to make boiling water but it was a hassle having to walk downstairs to make it and carry it back up. The machine also wasn't working so I had to come back upstairs to get my phone and use Google translate to figure out what was wrong (the coffee grind drawer wasn't properly inserted or something). I finally got my boiling water, which was a relief but it would be much more comfortable just to have a kettle in the room. Otherwise, no complaints! I would happily stay here again.

title: Great hotel in Graz
positive_comment: Clean room and bathroom, good room size, GREAT air conditioning (one of the coldest i have ever been in), close to train station and city center, helpful staff with remote check in and check out, great price for F1 grand prix weekend
negative_comment: Bathroom was small, which wasn't a problem for me but could be for a lot of people

positive_comment: Todo! El desayuno es excelente, amplia variedad de alimentos para tomar, sólo hubiera agregado algunas frutas más. Todo exquisito. La ubicación, muy cercana al casco histórico, permite ir a todos lados a pie. Graz me fascinó, es maravillosa, y el hotel excelente. Lo recomendaría.

title: War ok
positive_comment: Check in lief unkompliziert. Zimmer 115 (mit Balkon zum Hof) ist gut gewesen.
negative_comment:
Die Betten sind sehr hart und telefonisch war kein Personal erreichbar. Jedoch war sofort jemand via Booking Chat erreichbar. 

Ich musste zwei mal das Personal kontaktieren. 
1. Keine freien Parkflächen im Aussenbereich. Liegt auch daran dass 5 (!) Fahrzeuge von Facility Management dort abgestellt sind und auch während meinem Aufenthalt nicht bewegt wurden (Freitag bis Sonntag). Mein Auto konnte ich auch nicht vor Ort aufladen, da das Facility Management Auto die ganze Zeit die Ladestation blockiert hat 🤦🏼‍♀️

Jedoch kann man sich nebenan am Schotterparkplatz parken. Das wusste ich nicht, da es nicht ausgeschildert war. 

2. Ich wurde von einem anderen Gast zugeparkt. Das war etwas mühsam.

positive_comment: Posizione, servizio parking, personale cordiale e disponibile.
negative_comment: Prezzo colazione un po' alto rispetto al servizio offerto.

positive_comment: Struttura a 7-8 minuti a piedi dalla stazione e a ca. 10 dall’Hauptplatz. Camera nuova e pulita.
negative_comment: Buona la colazione, ricca e variegata, ma 19€ mi sembrano tantini.

positive_comment:
Camera molto spaziosa pulita letto comodo temperatura perfetta bagno ottimo 
Ci siamo trovati bene

positive_comment:

Comodissimo per il nostro weekend a Graz!

title: Ottimo rapporto qualità prezzo

positive_comment: Fantastic location between the train station and the old city. You can walk everywhere. Great supermarket nearby. Very clean. Fast internet. Friendly staff who let me check in early. I slept very well.
negative_comment: My only issue was that there was no kettle in the room to make a cup of tea. I was very jetlagged and wanted to make a cup of tea at 3am when I was wide awake. The night before I had asked the staff how to use the coffee machine downstairs to make boiling water but it was a hassle having to walk downstairs to make it and carry it back up. The machine also wasn't working so I had to come back upstairs to get my phone and use Google translate to figure out what was wrong (the coffee grind drawer wasn't properly inserted or something). I finally got my boiling water, which was a relief but it would be much more comfortable just to have a kettle in the room. Otherwise, no complaints! I would happily stay here again.

La nostra camera dava sulla strada principale che era molto trafficata e , nonostante la finestra (con tripli vetri) chiusa , si sentiva lo stesso rumore

Sehr nettes Personal!
negative_comment: Die Lage ist zentral,  aber leider an den Sommerabenden zum Wochenende auf Grund des gegenüberliegenden Platzes mit Gastronomie recht lange laut.

positive_comment: Ein sehr nettes und gut geführtes Gasthaus. Ist empfehlenswert.

Struttura famigliare accoglienza super posizione perfetta

Caratteristica pensione in posizione ottima, si raggiunge facilmente, si può parcheggiare l'auto in strada, si trova in un quartiere carino pieno di piccoli negozi e locali, e con una passeggiata di dieci minuti, attraversando il fiume, si è in pieno centro città. Sotto gli alloggi c'è un ristorante molto frequentato dove si mangia bene a prezzi interessanti. Direi tutto ottimo.
negative_comment: La nostra stanza era al secondo piano senza ascensore, e credo che la cosa andrebbe segnalata, ma per stare in una struttura tipica penso che le scale  siano inevitabile.

positive_comment: L'appartamento è molto carino e coccolo. E pulizie ottime.  Tornerei🤩

Personale accogliente 
Appartamento molto bello curato e pulito

title: Totalmente recomendable.

El personal es muy eficiente, siempre sonriendo y amable. Y los desayunos muy buenos y variados.
A 15min andando de la estación y a 7 minutos del centro..

title: Buen hotel, buena ubicación. Muy recomendable.
positive_comment: Es un hotel básico pero muy cómodo (aunque no tienen ascensor). La habitación ya estaba hecha al volver de desayunar. No se pasa nada de frío, más bien al contrario. Recomiendo contratar el desayuno con la habitación, saldrá más barato y hay bastante variedad.
negative_comment:
No había frigo en la habitación. 
El wifi se desconectaba continuamente.

title: Habitación cómoda en una excelente ubicación
positive_comment: Habitación grande y cómoda en una excelente ubicación. Buen desayuno.
negative_comment: Falta de aire acondicionado en verano.

title: LUGAR CON UN ENCANTO PARTICULAR
positive_comment: El lugar tiene su encanto porque tiene una decoración muy original. Está céntrico, cercano al Kuntsmuseum y a Mariahilfer.
negative_comment: El suelo sonaba demasiado al andar. No tenía aire acondicionado, ni nevera, probablemente en consecuencia a sus políticas de respeto al medio ambiente. Por lo demás todo muy bien.

title: Habitación cómoda y espaciosa en una genial ubicación. Recomendable!

negative_comment: En verano hace calor en las habitaciones y no hay aire acondicionado.

title: Hogareño.
positive_comment: La chica que trabaja en recepción fue muy amable y preocupada, ese día llegué con una reacción alérgica muy fuerte e hizo todo lo posible por ayudarme. El hotel estaba en una excelente ubicación, muy cerca de todo caminando. La habitación era enorme y muy linda! Si vuelvo a la ciudad, definitivamente quiero volver a hospedarme allí. El desayuno estaba muy bien, era bastante variado.
negative_comment: Por decir algo, quizás el horario de recepción podría ser hasta más tarde, a las 19:30 hrs es aún un poco temprano por si algún huésped llega a necesitar algo. Si bien hay un mensaje que dice que hay que comunicarse con el personal del restaurante, al tocar la puerta interior nadie acudió a atender.

positive_comment: Bien ubicado. Habitación espaciosa . Con restaurante con buena comida y a precios razonables.
negative_comment: Escaleras para llegar a habitación. Pocos enchufes al lado de la cama. Falta alargue.o trifásico. No tiene ventilador.

title: Good stay

The location, the room, the restaurant, the breakfast, the staff are amazing. Close to the city center, the train station. I recommend it to everyone, next time I go to Graz, I will definitely stay there again. I also loved the ladder shelves. Thank you for everything! 🙏

Accoglienza cortese ed efficace, disponibilità, informazioni utili sulla mobilità urbana
Parcheggio molto comodo a vista

title: Soluzione ideale per visitare Graz (città deliziosa).
positive_comment: Stanza molto ampia, nel complesso ottimo rapporto qualità/prezzo. Ottima pulizia. Bagno di buone dimensioni con vasca tipo idromassaggio. Staff cortese e professionale, zona parcheggio di fianco all'albergo a prezzo contenuto gestita da loro direttamente. Buona e abbondante colazione (tra l'altro è stato applicato un robusto sconto alla colazione considerando mio figlio 17enne come "bambino"). Ottima posizione per arrivare in centro a piedi in pochi minuti.
negative_comment: Qualche elemento di arredo un po' datato ma si tratta di minuzie.

title: Tutto ok, tranne il letto
positive_comment: Posizione, possibilità parcheggio (a pagamento), buona colazione, gentilezza dello staff.
negative_comment: Ci sono stato due volte nel giro di una settimana, due camere diverse, entrambe non particolarmente spaziose e, soprattutto, letti piuttosto scomodi.

title: Ottimo per visitare la città
positive_comment:
Posizione, in 15min a piedi so raggiunge il centro. 
Disponibilità dello staff, la ragazza alla reception ci ha aiutati a trovare un ristorante dove mangiare a capodanno.
negative_comment: Abbiamo avuto problemi con il letto (da un lato si sono staccate alcune viti) e abbiamo dovuto ugualmente dormire due notti in quella stanza.

title: Buon compromesso prezzo qualità

negative_comment: Pulizia in camera da migliorare, poche alternative dolci per colazione

positive_comment: La colazione inclusa,ottima e abbondante, la posizione e la cordialità dello staff
negative_comment: Niente

positive_comment: posizione comoda per i mezzi pubblici, bus e tramvia, colazione ricca e abbondante. Camera e letto confortevole, con bagno grande e finestrato, ero in una singola.

title: Zona Gries stazione
positive_comment:
Gran bel hotel con molte camere e bar all'entrata, vicino la stazione e con una posizione buona anche per raggiungere il centro
Camera piccola ma ben igienizzata con tutto ciò che serviva
Prezzo della camera non esagerato
Staff gentile e veloce
negative_comment:
Posto auto lo credevo migliore visto che non è affatto gratis
Letto attaccato alla grande finestra e per chiuderla ed aver un po' di privacy, solo una sottile tendina nera
Non consiglio né la colazione per il prezzo è né di prender un caffè al bar che non lo sanno fare

positive_comment: posizione ideale, staff gentilissimo e garage adiacente alla struttura che per un motociclista è tanta roba
negative_comment: tutto ok

positive_comment: Das Service und die Freundlichkeit war außergewöhnlich!
negative_comment: Frühes Frühstück, Bedienung, extra Ham and Eggs gemacht.

title: Ein familiengeführtes Hotel das keine Wünsche offen lässt.
positive_comment: Das freundliche Personal, die zentrale Lage, hervorragendes Frühstück

Tolles Preis -Leistungs Verhältnis 
Sehr freundliches Personal und gutes Frühstück
Bahnhofsnähe, freundlicher Empfang, vielseitiges Frühstücksbuffet, sauberes ruhiges Zimmer, gemütliche private Atmosphäre, alles in allem 👍👍
negative_comment: gibt's nichts auszusetzen.

title: Engagiertes Personal, super Lage gleich beim Bahnhof und alles sehr sauber!
positive_comment: Das Personal war überaus freundlich, hilfsbereit und entspannt! Wirklich großes Lob dafür. Die Einrichtung der Zimmer ist etwas veraltet, aber in gutem Zustand und alles sehr sauber. Beim Frühstück war die Auswahl nicht extrem groß, aber völlig ausreichend für ein Stadthotel. Wenn wir wieder einmal einen Urlaub in Graz machen, kommen wir gerne wieder!
ausgezeichnetes Frühstück !  Top Lage ! Sehr freundliches Personal !

title: Top!
positive_comment: La gentillesse du gérant, le confort, la bouilloire dans la chambre avec thé et café, le petit déjeuner, le parking
A côté de la gare, personnel très sympathique, j'ai eu droit a un surclassement gratuit à  mon arrivée, j'ai pu laisser mes bagages à la réception pour la journée de visite dans la ville.
Tout était super accueil chambre spacieuse petit déjeuner au top et emplacement proche des transports en commun

title: Excellente étape
positive_comment: Accueil. agréable et personnel serviable . Très bon petit-déjeuner. Emplacement a proximité du centre de Graz (5 mn en velo).  Facilité de parking pour la voiture et nos vélos
negative_comment: Rien

positive_comment:
Le personnel est sympathique et réactif. 
Le lit est confortable.
Le petit déjeuner est copieux.
Proche de la gare et à 15mn du centre ville.

Dans l'ensemble l'hôtel est très bien et le buffet des petits déjeuners est excellent il y en a pour tous les goûts. Le personnel est aimable accueillant, souriant et à l'écoute. De plus l'hôtel se situe à 3 minutes à pied de la station de bus et de tram ce qui facilite l'accès au centre-ville
negative_comment: Comme souvent dans les hôtels en Autriche, il n'y a pas de volets .   juste quelques stores et rideaux occultant qui laissent passer la lumière le matin. Heureusement le triple vitrage corrige le bruit important qu'il peut y avoir sur le boulevard.

title: Tient ses promesses
positive_comment: La localisation et la réactivité du personnel. Le petit déjeuner est bien.
La gentillesse du personnel. La propreté et le confort des chambres. La gare est juste à côté.
negative_comment: L'éloignement du Centre ville (20 min à pied env)

title: J'ai bien aimé
positive_comment: La salle de bain avec douche etait pratique et jolie
negative_comment: La vu et les travaux a proximité

positive_comment: La proximité de la gare, la chambre sur la cour intérieure donc moins bruyante que sur la rue et la propreté !
negative_comment: Chambre très petite et petit déjeuner trop cher .

title: Ottima pensione familiare ed accogliente in posizione strategica.
positive_comment: Siamo già stati qualche anno fa in questa struttura, trovandoci già allora molto bene, e siamo tornati molto volentieri. Ambiente familiare ed accogliente. Gentilissimo e collaborativo lo staff. Ampia e pulita la camera, nella zona più nuova della pensione. Ottimo letto, ottima doccia. - Colazione adeguata. - Al piano terra un ottimo e comodissimo ristorantino, con possibilità di mangiare alla carta od optare per la mezza o intera pensione, dove abbiamo mangiato sempre molto bene. - La posizione è assolutamente strategica, e le zone salienti del centro sono tutte rapidamente raggiungibili a piedi. - Nelle vicinanze c'è un garage convenzionato, che viene offerto gratuitamente. - Ottima l'organizzazione per il carico/scarico dei bagagli in un'area immediatamente adiacente usufruibile con apposito permesso. - Ottimo rapporto qualità/prezzo. Abbiamo già prenotato nuovamente per un altro prossimo soggiorno.
negative_comment: L'unico problema rilevato è stato il segnale del WiFi che purtroppo nella posizione della nostra stanza, pur essendoci campo anche pieno, non riusciva ad agganciare Internet, ed al quale abbiamo dovuto alfine rinunciare.

positive_comment: Abbiamo passato tre giorni bellissimi a Graz, complice il periodo dell'Avvento con i mercatini, l'Hotel proprio come desideravamo, centrale, a 10 minuti dall'Hauptplaz e dall'Uhrturm. Un'atmosfera e un ottima cucina che rispetta la tradizione stiriana. Il personale gentilissimo. Ci torneremo🤗

Posizione non centrale ma facilmente raggiungibile il centro storico a piedi.
Colazione variegata e di buona qualità, in particolare il salato.
Abbiamo cenato presso la struttura e abbiamo mangiato molto bene i piatti locali, con cortesia e disponibilità del personale  al top.
negative_comment: La struttura purtroppo non dispone di ascensore.

title: Molto confortevole
positive_comment: Tutto l’arredo era comodo e confortevole, lo staf gentilissimo il cibo ottimo e ben porzionato, peccato che ero di passaggio saremmo rimasti di più, ottima zona, parcheggio auto in zona e il fine settimana non appagamento tutto perfetto.
negative_comment: Forse per il ristorante un seggiolino per il bambino sarebbe stato comodo, ma ringrazio comunque della culla per il bambino anche se non l’avevo richiesta era già pronta in stanza molto gentile da parte dello staf.

title: We had a very pleasant stay and would happily come back again.
positive_comment: The room was clean and comfortable, the breakfast had a good variety, and the location was very convenient. The staff were also very friendly and helpful throughout our stay. Overall, the hotel met all our expectations and offered great value for the price.
Good location and decent breakfast. The staff was friendly and helpful.
negative_comment: The toilet had an unpleasant smell, which made the stay less comfortable. Cleanliness could be improved.

title: Recommended
positive_comment: The reception staff was extremely kind and helpful, the room was much bigger than expected, clean and comfortable. We had a good night's sleep, and breakfast was absolutely amazing

Great location near the train station — not far from the old town.
The breakfasts are tasty. 
Many thanks to the reception staff member, who was always helpful and in a great mood.
negative_comment:
The pillows are uncomfortable, but the bed is very good.
At breakfast, it would be nice to have some vegetables — at least a couple of options.

positive_comment: Nice clean well located hotel near to train stations and bus etc
negative_comment: Nothing really good value hotel

title: City trip
positive_comment:
Nice hotel approx. 5 minutes walk from the main railway station & even though near main road couldn't hear any noise
Friendly helpful staff
Good size comfy room with kettle/tea/coffee/cream in the room
Good WIFI
negative_comment:
Cold water from taps in sink was coming out as warm (not good when needing to brush teeth)
Furniture a bit tired

title: Clean hotel, friendly staff, brilliant breakfast. We really enjoyed our stay.
positive_comment: Breakfast was delicious and plenty of it. The bar in Reception was well stocked and reasonably priced. The bar area was comfortable and inviting. Rooms were clean and we had everything we needed.
negative_comment: Only thing that could make it better would be if evening meals were available

title: Overall, everything was great and I really enjoyed my one night stay at the hotel.
positive_comment: Breakfast was excellent, with a wide variety of fresh and tasty options. The staff were very supportive, attentive, and genuinely engaged, which made the stay even more pleasant.
negative_comment: The only minor downside was that the mattress was a bit too soft for my personal preference, but this did not significantly affect the overall positive experience.

title: great quality price ratio hotel close to the main train station. A cozy place.
positive_comment: I liked the cosy little hotel bar. The service was excellent and I liked the company of the easily relatable compéres.
The staff were great location and for the price an absolute bargain.

title: La pension est un établissement de caractère très bien tenu où il est agréable d'y séjourner
positive_comment:
J'ai apprécié le charme un peu ancien du lieu 
J'ai aimé la possibilité de se restaurer sur place, en terrasse.
negative_comment: RAS

positive_comment:

L'hôtel est très confortable et propre. La décoration est très jolie et drôle.
La chambre est confortable et fonctionnelle.
La cuisine du restaurant est délicieuse et le rapport qualité/prix est exceptionnelle. On mange très bien et les prix sont très abordables.
negative_comment: La chambre sous les toits sans climatisation en pleine canicule ne nous a pas permis d'avoir des nuits reposantes.

title: Bonne expérience

negative_comment: Le wifi avait des ratés.

title: Good stay
positive_comment: Central location, bar downstairs with good range of beers. Very friendky and efficient receptionist. Clean hotel with good hot water, comfortable bed.

The location, the room, the restaurant, the breakfast, the staff are amazing. Close to the city center, the train station. I recommend it to everyone, next time I go to Graz, I will definitely stay there again. I also loved the ladder shelves. Thank you for everything! 🙏
Great location. Good value for money. Amazing breakfast. Very cozy
Cute place, thematic property, good breakfast, located close to the centre.

title: In Austria for a football match in Graz. Stayed in Vienna also. Such a wonderful country.

negative_comment: Pillows very soft.

title: Great location, lovely welcome and excellent rooms
positive_comment: Traditional Austrian Hotel with modern touch to rooms

title: Great location, helpful and friendly staff

Very convenient location near the tourist spots for eating and sightseeing. The breakfast was diverse, and the restaurant was convenient for an easy local lunch/dinner. The housekeeping managed to complete their clean/tidy on my second day while I was having breakfast, very convenient.
negative_comment: There was no elevator and I was on the top floor, but the staff offered to help with my baggage.

positive_comment: Excellent breakfast. Super accommodating personnel
Excellent place, location not far from the city center, and very helpful and friendly staff. Absolutely recommended!

title: comfort and clean room, friendly staff, good location

negative_comment: Bed is a bit too firm for my taste and pillows not very comfortable. Air conditioner made odd popping noises a few times overnight. Last day Sunday there was only staff until 15:00 which means leaving luggage beyond then was not possible. In my case that was ok but had I planned to stay longer this would have been an issue. Breakfast was ok but nothing spectacular.

title: Overall it was ok
positive_comment: The lady at the reception was very nice. The location suits us perfectly. We stayed there before. Although there were some construction works going on, it was quiet. But we would prefer if we would be informed about the construction works and no parking in front of the hotel prior to booking. The room itself was clean, we liked the sign on the wall. It is a nice touch. Air condition worked perfectly. Beds are comfortable, showers are very spatious. There is also a back entrance to the bulding, we used it when going out. They prepare for self check in, I would miss the interaction in person.
negative_comment: In the breakfast room the coffee maschine was broken. Ok, we understand, it happens. But the milk was served in a glass jar and it cooled down, the coffee as well. Also they do not refill food. What is served, there is, and when it is finished, they do not refill it. For example, some sort kurbiskernen spread, cheese, salami, baked bacon.

positive_comment:
Bright comfortable spacious room.
Nice area and short walk to city centre.
Staff helpful and pleasant and allowed us to store our bags on checkout. 
Graz is a great town, we hope to return. We would stay here again.
negative_comment: Liked everything

positive_comment:
Great location to explore Graz. 
Nearby parking available for 15eur if booked throught reception (otherwise 40eur per 24 hours!! )
Good breakfast.

title: Excellent value and very positive experience
positive_comment: Very well located, close to main attractions without being in the middle of the crowds. Staff was great and helpful. Looks like the rooms have been recently refurbished and everything looks fresh and pleasing. Breakfast was great. Would stay again for sure.
negative_comment: For the kind of value the hotel delivers I can't really pick anything.

positive_comment: Perfect location, great personnel, tasty breakfast. No dedicated hotel parking, but this issue was solved instantly by providing ticket to the nearest public garage.
negative_comment: Some may be surprised by the interesting interior decision (shower cabin and sink right in front of a bed) with no door between bathroom and bedroom zones. Not a problem for an individual traveller, but might be an inconvenience for some cases.

title: Excellent
positive_comment: Everything was great. The hotel is on the nice location in the center of Graz, the staff was friendly, rooms were modern,cosy and clean..parking garage is near the hotel (100m) and everything else is near..

title: The loveliest hotel in Graz
positive_comment: This is the most charming hotel. We felt like home. It is close to literally everything and there are a couple of great restaurants and cute shops around. The parking is right in front of the hotel. Breakfast is amazing. The staff is always smiling and nice. I can’t reccomend this hotel enough. We fell in love with Graz and when we come back,we’ll stay in this hotel. Thank you for everything.

It was well located. Great reception staff and was very clean. The bec and bedding was very comfy

title: Muy acogedor.
positive_comment:
Ubicación: muy céntrico, en el corazón de una zona con ambiente y a menos de 20m, a pie, de la Catedral y el Mausoleo.
Habitación: amplia, luminosa, impoluta y, lo mejor que puedo decir, 'acogedora'. Cuarto de ducha amplio y separado del wc, también amplio. Magnífico colchón. Tiene un pequeño minibar y el wifi se coge bien.
Desayuno: tipo buffet. Hay donde elegir. Todo lo que probe bueno.
Personal: profesional y muy atento.
Parking: abierto, enfrente de la entrada del hotel. No dispone de muchas plazas.
negative_comment: Por poner un 'pero', si hubiera tenido una hervidora en la habitación sería perfecto.

title: CORRECTO
positive_comment: Hotel situado fuera del centro histórico pero muy cercano a ello. En la calle del hotel hay mucha vida con restaurantes. El hotel y el desayuno cumplen.

title: Habitaciones modernas y muy confortables
positive_comment: El hotel y las habitaciones eran muy lindos y confortables. La decoración es muy moderna y la habitación y el baño son muy espaciosos y bien decorados. La atención del personal es muy buena. De hecho fueron muy amables ya que el estacionamiento del hotel era pago pero como estaba casi vacío no me cobraron la tarifa.
negative_comment: En realidad estoy muy conforme con todo. El único detalle es que la cama estaba formada por 2 camas individuales juntas, lo cual no es cómodo. Hubiera sido un buen gesto que dejaran una botellita de agua de cortesía.

title: Nuestra primera opción en Graz
positive_comment:
Hemos estado varias veces alojados en este hotel. Nuestra hija vive en Graz y vamos cuando podemos. La primera vez que nos alojamos ahí fue en 2017, pero después de esa fecha renovaron el hotel y superó con creces nuestras expectativas. Intentamos ir cada año y siempre es nuestra primera opción. Seguiremos alojándonos en este hotel siempre que esté disponible.
El personal es encantador y muy dispuesto a ayudar en lo que puedan. La entrada y salida, en caso de ser en horario fuera de recepción, se hace sin problema. 
Muchas gracias.

It is a nice touch. Air condition worked perfectly. Beds are comfortable, showers are very spatious. There is also a back entrance to the bulding, we used it when going out. They prepare for self check in, I would miss the interaction in person.
negative_comment: In the breakfast room the coffee maschine was broken. Ok, we understand, it happens. But the milk was served in a glass jar and it cooled down, the coffee as well. Also they do not refill food. What is served, there is, and when it is finished, they do not refill it. For example, some sort kurbiskernen spread, cheese, salami, baked bacon.

positive_comment:
Frühstück war super 
Große zimmer mit Klimaanlage 
Sauber
Man hat sich wohl gefühlt
negative_comment:
Parkplätze sind nicht im Hotel, wenn man Pech hat, muss man im Parkhaus parken. Aber da gibt es ein Lösung vom Hotel. Man bekommt Rabatt vom Hotel aus. 

Quietschende Dielen - aber das ist Jammern auf hohen Niveaus.

title: Top Hotel zu einem Top Preis in einer absoluten Bestlage - Empfehlung pur!
positive_comment: Top-Hotel! Immer gerne wieder. Super freundliches Personal - schneller Check-In. Wir konnten sogar 2 Stunden früher unser Zimmer beziehen. Wir hatten im 3. Stock eine 2 stöckige Suite mit Wendeltreppe, bequemem Bett, 2 Fernsehern, einem tollen neu renovierten Bad und Klimaanlage. Wirklich außergewöhnlich! Auch das Frühstück spielt alle Stückerln. Es ist für jeden was dabei, sogar Lachs und Prosecco gab es. Es war wirklich wieder mega. Wir kommen sicher wieder! DANKE
negative_comment: Es gibt hier nicht, was man zu bemängeln hätte!

title: Jederzeit gerne wieder!
positive_comment: Ausgezeichnete Lage in der Innenstadt, reichhaltiges Frühstück, geräumiges und schönes Zimmer, freundliches Personal
Sehr schöne große Zimmer. Die Einrichtung ist ein guter Mix aus Modern und alter Historie.
negative_comment: Parkplatz 500m entfernt. Spontan kein Frühstück mehr zu bekommen.

title: Perfekte zentrale Lage, freundliches Personal und günstiger Parkplatz.
positive_comment: Wir hatten einen sehr angenehmen Aufenthalt. Das Frühstück war sehr gut und bot eine große Auswahl. Die Lage des Hotels ist perfekt – sehr zentral und ideal, um alles bequem zu Fuß zu erreichen. Besonders praktisch fanden wir auch den vergünstigten Preis für das Parkhaus. Das Personal war jederzeit freundlich, hilfsbereit und aufmerksam. Wir würden das Hotel auf jeden Fall weiterempfehlen.

title: Komme gerne wieder
positive_comment: Die Lage, das bequeme Zimmer, großzügiges Bad, freundliches und zuvorkommendes Personal
negative_comment: Kann durch Lage und Restaurant auch mal länger etwas lauter sein am Abend, Fenster dichten jedoch das meiste ab.

positive_comment: Tolle Lage, sehr gutes Frühstück und sehr schöne Zimmer

title: Excelente desayuno y ubicación
positive_comment: Excelente ubicación,  y el desayuno mejor aún. Habitaciones amplias y cómodas. Puedes arrimar el vehículo para descargar y cargar las maletas.  Un estaciomiento cercano. Es una construcción antigua muy bien conservada.

title: Un acierro desde luego
positive_comment: Un acierto, situacion inmejorable, facil de llegar, personal amable y todo facilidades, parking cerca a buen precio y el mejor chuleton que me he comido en mucho tiempo en wl restaurante del hotel. Ah, y un pub Irlandes a 100 metros muy chulo para tomar un Jameson despues del chuleton. Una maravilla vamos!
negative_comment: Todo fenomemal!

title: Estupenda
positive_comment:
Buena localización
Habitación muy amplia
Cama muy cómoda
negative_comment: Nada

title: Quick stay in Graz
positive_comment:
It was well located. Great reception staff and was very clean. The bec and bedding was very comfy

 

Represents good value for the money .
negative_comment:
The room we had was very dark...it was a design choice and there wasn't any light to speak of.

It was difficult to regulate the temperature of the room as we were missing the remote. I'm sure the hotel would have corrected this had we pursued it.

title: We will be back :)
positive_comment: Very nice location, friendly staff and nice apartments with vintage vibe.
negative_comment: All was good

title: A high quality traditional hotel with modern amenities.
positive_comment: Comfortable room with ensuite shower facility. High levels of cleanliness. Breakfast was a good mix of fruits, cereals, cold meats, cheeses, and eggs, with good tea/coffee facilities. Location is excellent: in the heart of the old town.
negative_comment: I expected breakfast to be included, but it was not. Even though the bed was a double bed, the two single duvets were not really big enough.

title: Excellent hotel in the middle of the city
positive_comment: Excellent location. Excellent staff. Lovely hotel. Comfortable room and bed with stylish decoration
negative_comment: Everything

title: Fabulous stay
positive_comment:
Reception team very friendly . Fabulous breakfast - eggs can be order to you're liking. 
Single room small but well arranged - I would of prefered a small wardrobe than the open hanging space and very small cupboard. 
Personally in winter I would preferred not to have to go outside to go to the room ( it would be fabulous in summer to be on the indoor terrace )
negative_comment: Nothing.

title: Fantastic location tucked away in a quiet space with lots of character- highly recommend!
positive_comment: Location is amazing and staff so helpful and accommodating!
negative_comment: Rooms were a little small but honestly fine for price and location!

title: Cozy, historical and close to the bookstore.
positive_comment: The breakfast attendant was a ray of sunshine. Getting gluten-free bread and scrambled eggs along with a smile got my day off to a fine start. Give this employee a raise.

Lage in Zentrumnähe - sehr schöne Zimmer und auch alles sehr sauber. Kaffee aus Kaffeemaschine wurde im Foyer zur Verfügung gestellt. Dieser war auch sehr gut.
Sehr positiv habe ich empfunden, dass sich die Dame im Büro für die "Umstände" entschuldigt hat und extrem hilfsbereit war.
negative_comment: Online-Check in - dieser konnte nur dank einer sehr freundlichen Dame bewältigt werden (Tablett funktionierte nicht zu 100 %). Frühstück war in ein Partnerlokal ausgelagert und konnte nicht wie früher im Hotel konsumiert werden. Dies war uns vorher nicht bekannt. Beim Frühstück selbst, war das Personal zwar sehr freundlich - jedoch  überfordert. Angemerkt wird, dass das Lokal um 9:00 Uhr voll war. Semmeln waren aufgetaut und feucht und Wurst und Käse mussten immer wieder urgiert werden (sicher auch aufgrund der hohen Gästeanzahl geschuldet).

positive_comment:
Seit einer Woche ein Self Service Hotel. Personal ist sehr bemüht, den Check In zu begleiten
Tolle Lage am Lendplatz
Großes und sauberes Zimmer.
Frühstück im Partnerhotel (Steirer Stuben ... 100m) sehr gut.
negative_comment:
Snack- / Getränke- / Kaffeeautomaten noch nicht in Betrieb (stehen aber schon)
Parken sehr schwierig. In der nächsten öffentlichen Garage (400m) 22 Euro/ Tag.

title: Transitübernachtung im Herzen der Stadt, um in wenigen Stunden viel von der Stadt zu Fuß zu sehen
positive_comment: Komfortable, geräumige Unterkunft in perfekter Lage. Das Badezimmer ist riesig und bietet sowohl eine Badewanne als auch eine Dusche. Zwischen dem luxuriösen Waschbecken auf der einen Seite und der nahezu separaten Toilette (mit Schiebetür) auf der anderen Seite ist sehr viel Platz. Vielleicht das beste Badezimmer, das wir je in einem Hotel gesehen haben. Der Preis ist für diese Lage und diesen Komfort sehr angemessen.
negative_comment: Es gibt nicht genügend Parkplätze in der Nähe des Hotels, sodass man sein Auto in einer öffentlichen Garage abstellen muss, die nicht direkt neben dem Hotel liegt und einige enge Passagen aufweist. Der Preis pro Tag (für Hotelgäste) ist jedoch sehr akzeptabel. Das Frühstück erschien uns zu teuer, weshalb wir es im Hotel nicht eingenommen haben. Ohne diese beiden Unannehmlichkeiten hätte die Bewertung 10 betragen können.

title: Super, jederzeit wieder sehr zu empfehlen
positive_comment: Perfekte Lage, super sauberes Hotel total nettes Personal
negative_comment: Die Dusche hat einen Mega glatten Boden Achtung geboten

title: teure, aber saubere Unterkunft in guter Lage
positive_comment: große Auswahl beim Frühstück; glutenfreies Gebäck erhalten; sauberes, sehr ruhiges Zimmer; Mini-Bar; Parkplatz direkt neben dem Hotel (kostenpflichtig!)
negative_comment: sehr unfreundlicher Empfang; falsche telefonische Auskunft bzgl. Parkplatzkosten; hoher Preis

title: Super tolles Zimmer Betten zum schlafen ein traum. Freundlichkeit  top.
positive_comment: Super Freundlich sauber tolle zimmer wir warn begeistert! Sehr zum weiter empfehlen. Wir kommen wieder.
negative_comment: Alles gepasst..

title: Hotel und die Lage Top !!
positive_comment: Wir waren das zweite mal im Hotel. Die Zimmer sind sehr schön und sauber. Die Betten angenehm. Das Frühstück war lecker der Kaffee sehr gut. Viel Auswahl von jedem etwas dabei. Das Personal super nett.
negative_comment: Uns wird der persönliche Kontakt mit Personal fehlen. Auch das gute Frühstück.

title: Stadtgenuss in Graz
positive_comment:
- Geräumiges Zimmer
- Gutes Frühstück
- Ideale Lage am Rande der Altstadt und für Ausflüge auf den Schlossberg

title: Schönes,ruhiges Zimmer an sehr guter Lage.
positive_comment: Neues stylisches und grosszügiges Zimmer. Alles hat funktioniert.
negative_comment: Rezeption könnte deutlich bessere Dienste leisten. Frische Eierspeisen wurden von einer Mitarbeiterin zubereitet, von einer anderen nicht (keine Zeit)?

title: Schönes Stadthotel in zentraler Lage
positive_comment: Zimmer mit Top Moderner Ausstattung, Gutes umfangreiches Frühstück
Posizione, ampiezza della stanza, disponibilità dello staff, pulizia
negative_comment: Nulla

title: Ottima posizione!
positive_comment: La posizione dell'hotel era perfetta, vicino alle principali attrazioni oltre che a 20min a piedi dalla stazione (12/13min con la linea 1 del tram), la camera era molto spaziosa e pulita, lo staff cordiale e disponibile (anche col check-in oltre l'orario consentito con una mail chiara e semplice di tutti i passaggi da effettuare).
negative_comment: Non è una cosa del tutto negativa ma se devo indicare qualcosa che non mi è piaciuto, è stata la colazione un po' limitata nella scelta e nei prodotti.

title: Un’ottimo boutique hotel in centro a Graz
positive_comment: Struttura piacevole, vicina al centro cittá, camere confortevoli e staff professionale, ottima colazione
negative_comment: Nulla

title: Soggiorno super confortevole
positive_comment: Camera famigliare grandissima e molto bella e ottima pulizia. Posizione top dell’hotel a due passi dal centro storico. Assolutamente consigliato.
Posizione, rapporto qualità/prezzo, garage a prezzo ridotto
negative_comment: Nulla da segnalare

title: Nice place in nice Town
positive_comment: Lo stile dell’hotel, molto particolare e curato. La posizione ottima nel centro della parte storica della città.
Posizione, pulizia, disponibilità del garage a prezzo scontato
negative_comment: Nulla da segnalare

title: Soggiorno di lavoro e con possibilità di visitare il centro
positive_comment: Posizione centrale a Graz e con un comodo parcheggio abbastanza vicino alla struttura.

title: Soggiorno molto piacevole a Graz!
positive_comment: L'Hotel è situato in pieno centro, ma il silenzio per riposare la notte è assicurato dai vetri isolanti. La nostra camera era molto carina, pulita e dotata di tutti i confort. Il personale è stato molto accogliente e gentile. La città di Graz è bellissima e merita una visita. Assolutamente da consigliare.

title: Wow per stile e posizione
positive_comment:
Stanza molto grande e bellissima, molto curata nell'arredamento. È stato bello trovare spazi decisamente più ampi rispetto a quel che ci si aspetta da un hotel. Anche il bagno bello con doccia grande. 
Colazione ben fornita sia la parte dolce che salata. Ho apprezzato molto la varietà di tè in foglie, non solo le classiche bustine.
negative_comment: C'era un po' di polvere sui mobili della stanza e sui lampadari dei corridoi, ma nulla di troppo.

title: Fabuloso
positive_comment: Excelente receção. Quartos muito espaçosos, muito confortaveis, ar condicionado, cozinha totalmenre equipada. Decoração moderna e com muito bom gosto. Limpeza excecional. O pequeno almoço foi fabuloso.
negative_comment: Nada a apontar

positive_comment: Não tem receção, mas o check-in no tablet foi eficiente

title: Perfect location, outstanding costvalue ratio.
positive_comment: Perfect. This place is in the heart of the city. The staff is very kind and helpful in every issue arisen. The rooms were modern and clean, nicely designed. It definitely well above avarage considering the costvalue ratio.
negative_comment: Maybe the door of the toilet and the bathroom, if I am forced to mention one. It was privacy glass, I do not really like it, but this can be a personal thing.

title: comfort and clean room, friendly staff, good location
positive_comment: Very comfort and clean room, friendly staff, good location

title: Decent hotel with good location.
positive_comment: Nice hotel and spacious, clean rooms. Good location with short walk to center and some nice restaurants near by. Morning staff was very friendly. Breakfast was ok.
negative_comment: Bed is a bit too firm for my taste and pillows not very comfortable. Air conditioner made odd popping noises a few times overnight. Last day Sunday there was only staff until 15:00 which means leaving luggage beyond then was not possible. In my case that was ok but had I planned to stay longer this would have been an issue. Breakfast was ok but nothing spectacular.

title: Overall it was ok
positive_comment: The lady at the reception was very nice. The location suits us perfectly. We stayed there before. Although there were some construction works going on, it was quiet. But we would prefer if we would be informed about the construction works and no parking in front of the hotel prior to booking. The room itself was clean, we liked the sign on the wall. It is a nice touch. Air condition worked perfectly. Beds are comfortable, showers are very spatious. There is also a back entrance to the bulding, we used it when going out. They prepare for self check in, I would miss the interaction in person.
negative_comment: In the breakfast room the coffee maschine was broken. Ok, we understand, it happens. But the milk was served in a glass jar and it cooled down, the coffee as well. Also they do not refill food. What is served, there is, and when it is finished, they do not refill it. For example, some sort kurbiskernen spread, cheese, salami, baked bacon.

positive_comment:
Bright comfortable spacious room.
Nice area and short walk to city centre.
Staff helpful and pleasant and allowed us to store our bags on checkout. 
Graz is a great town, we hope to return. We would stay here again.
negative_comment: Liked everything

positive_comment:
Great location to explore Graz. 
Nearby parking available for 15eur if booked throught reception (otherwise 40eur per 24 hours!! )
Good breakfast.

title: Old warm charm, exceptional service
positive_comment: Breakfast , service, housekeeping , front desk was excellent.  Lobby and rooms likely need more modernization to attract those 40 and under.
negative_comment: Nothing our stay was extraordinary

positive_comment:
Sehr zentral mitten in der Stadt, Frühstück war sehr gut und man hat echt alles gehabt. 
Zimmer sehr groß wo man echt viel Platz hat.
negative_comment: Nichts 😊

positive_comment:
localisation top à côté de la lendplatz, et tout près du centre historique
Nombreux restos et bars à proximité.

Personnel très accueillant toujours le sourire 
Très bon déjeuner 
Très grande chambre tranquille 
Prêt des sites à visiter

title: Excellent séjour dans cet hôtel très central et confortable
positive_comment: Grande chambre, grande salle de bain, toilettes séparées, 2 lavabos, douche + baignoire, très bonne situation géographique, bon petit déjeuner, petit parking devant l'hôtel non couvert mais pratique si on a la chance d'avoir de la place
negative_comment:
Peu de produits lavants, même pas de distributeur.
Pas de porte séparative pour la salle de bain, ce qui peut être gênant pour certains clients.
Personnel ne parlant pas toujours l'anglais.

positive_comment: Hôtel bien situé près du centre ville. Possibilité de garer la voiture devant l'hôtel avec un supplément. Belle chambre spacieuse, très bonne literie. Petit déjeuner excellent. Personnel accueillant.
negative_comment: Un petit bémol pour le café qui n'était pas à notre goût.  Cela vient-il du distributeur ou de la qualité du café ?

positive_comment: Localisation, confort de la chambre, amabilité du personnel

title: Hôtel idéal pour un séjour à Graz
positive_comment: Tout. L'accueil, les équipements de l'hôtel. Le confort de la literie et le calme.
negative_comment: Rien

positive_comment:
Les chambres très modernes n'ont rien à voir avec l 'accueil et l espace petit-déjeuner plutôt vieillot. La chambre était super spacieuse, idem pour la salle de bain et les toilettes séparées. Le tout dans un décor très design.
Le parking privé est petit mais pratique et seulement à 7 euros la journée. L'hôtel est idéalement situé pour visiter Graz. Le petit-déjeuner est très correct.
negative_comment: L'accueil un peu froid :-)

positive_comment: Chambre moderne tout confort. Bien placé sur la ville pour se balader à pieds
negative_comment: Parking un peu serré et vaut mieux ne pas avoir à bouger.

title: Génial
positive_comment: Tout était parfait, situation géographique, propreté, accueil et service. Petit déj super.
negative_comment: Seul bémol, uniquement de simples rideaux aux fenêtres. Pas occultant. Plein jour des 7h du matin.

title: Parfait
positive_comment: Établissement hyper central. Parking proche (payant 15 euros/jour). Chambre spacieuse, propre et bien équipée. Personnel très serviable et charmant. Petit-déjeuner très complet. A recommander.
negative_comment: Ne pas aimer est bien trop fort mais il n’y a de volet, juste des rideaux. Cela peut gêner les personnes qui dorment dans le noir complet 😉

positive_comment: Es war ein sehr schöner außergewöhnlich Aufenthalt in einem sehr schönen Zimmer, wir kommen gerne jederzeit wieder! Besonders die schöne Kunst und der Terassengarten haben uns sehr gut gefallen.
negative_comment:
Die Vorhänge im Zimmer haben nicht gut verdunkelt!
Die Feder-Bettdecken sollten im Sommer (es war sehr warm) durch wesentlich leichtere ersetzt werden
Das Frühstück war uns zu teuer, in den umliegenden Cafés frühstückt man hervorragend und wesentlich günstiger.
Trotzdem geben wir dem Hotel die maximale Punktzahl!!!

title: Komme gerne wieder!
positive_comment: Hervorragendes Frühstück, Zimmer groß und man fühlt sich wirklich wohl darin (Parkettboden im Zimmer), Sehr freundliches Personal. Sauna nicht groß aber angenehm. Mit den vielen Bildern bekannter Künstler hat man das gefühl man übernachtet in einer Gallerie.
negative_comment: Wir hatten ein Zimmer richtung Straße, nette Aussicht auf die Mur aber in der Nacht hört man deshalb ein bißchen den Straßenlärm - nicht sehr stark, aber doch (ich bin diesbezüglich sehr sensibel).

title: ...sind immer wieder gerne Gast! 🙂
positive_comment: sehr stylisches Hotel mit grandiosem Garten und super nettem Personal!
negative_comment: ein Kühlschrank am Zimmer wäre schön 😉

title: Genussvoll
positive_comment: Tolles Appartement, grosszügige Ausstattung, schöne Aussicht

title: Ein Platz zum Wohlfühlen
positive_comment: Der Garten mit seinen Terrassen ist eine Oase, perfekt für einen Sundowner und zum Entspannen. Beeindruckend sind auch die Bilder und Kunstwerke, die überall im Haus zu finden sind. Zimmer und Aufenthaltsräume sind geschmackvoll ausgestattet. Das Frühstück lässt keine Wünsche offen. Die Lage ist grandios, neben zum Stadtzentrum bzw. Straßenbahnhaltestelle vor dem Haus.

title: Schönes Hotel an bester Lage
positive_comment: Mir gefiel der style des Hotels. Das Personal an der reception und beim Frühstück war zuvorkommend und nett. Das Einzelzimmer nr. 43 war hübsch und es gab genug Platz .
negative_comment: Im Zimmer absolut kein Ausblick! Das müsste erwähnt werden und das Hotel könnte dafür einen tieferen Preis verlangen  - als Vorschlag.

positive_comment:
Toplage direkt in der Altstadt 
Sehr gute Qualität der Speisen am Frühstückstisch
negative_comment: Keine Dusche, nir Badewanne auf dem Zimmer, sehr rutschig

title: Empfehlenswertes Hotel
positive_comment: Ein gut gelegenes, geschackvoll eingerichtetes Hotel. Schönes, grosses Zimmer.Freundliches Personal. Gutes Frühstück.
negative_comment: Das Zimmer hatte leider keine Dusche. Ein No-go ln der heutigen Zeit! (Duschen in der Badewanne ist umständlich und gefährlich, Rutschgefahr!)

title: Ein hervorragendes Hotel mit durchgängig hochprofessionellem Personal
positive_comment:
Das Zimmer wies eine einmalige, sehr geschmackvolle individuelle Einrichtung auf. Das Badezimmer war räumlich sehr großzügig angelegt und wies eine sehr hohe Funktionalität auf. Es war in einem Topzustand und bemerkenswert sauber.
Das Frühstücksbüffet war sehr abwechslungsreich, reichhaltig und von hoher Qualität. Das Personal im Frühstücksbereich wie aber auch das an der Rezeption trat freundlich und mit einer sehr hohen Professionalität auf.
negative_comment: Der Fahrstuhl war sehr eng und auch schon etwas in die Jahre gekommen.

positive_comment: Posizione centrale, hotel accogliente, camera pulita e grande
negative_comment: Colazione presa a parte 19 euro, prezzo alto per una colazione nella norma. Una stanza vicino ha tenuto la TV accesa tutta notte, un po' si sentiva.

positive_comment:
Struttura moderna, accogliente e in pieno centro di Graz ma camere estremamente silenziose.
Camere molto ampie e pulitissime con un letto grande e comodo.
I dintorni dell'hotel (zona semi pedonale) sono molto belli e tranquilli, anche la sera, con tanti locali.
Parcheggio pubblico a prezzo convenzionato nelle vicinanze.
negative_comment:
Le tende oscuranti non coprono la larghezza delle finestre e il mattino entra molta luce.
Colazione buona ma 19 euro a persona sono eccessivi.

positive_comment: Posizione centralissima,parcheggio in struttura,colazione abbondante sia salata che dolce, staff gentile e disponibile.

title: Una notte di passaggio per Vienna
positive_comment: Ottima posizione ed ottima stanza(avevamo prenotato una junior suite)
negative_comment: Peccato per la colazione per quanto riguarda la parte dolce! Avremmo mangiato volentieri un croissant ma non c'erano

title: Eccezionale rapporto qualità prezzo.
positive_comment: Camera impeccabile, pulitissima e spaziosissima con bagno in locale separato dal wc. Letto comodissimo e ottimo isolamento acustico. Colazione del tutto superiore alla media degli hotel di questa categoria. La posizione dell'albergo è ideale per visitare la città. Non essendo nel centro storico, ma adiacente allo stesso, dispone di posteggio auto ad un prezzo del tutto ragionevole. Il ristorante consigliato si è rivelato ottimo (cucina tipica) e con tariffe molto convenienti. Nei pressi c'è anche un mercato.
negative_comment: Nulla! Unico possibile suggerimento: aggiungere un bollitore nella stanza.

title: Week end a Graz
positive_comment: Hotel in centro storico, di recente ristrutturazione. Camere ampie e accoglienti. Personale disponibile e molto gentile. Parcheggio privato gratuito
negative_comment: Nulla

title: Consigliato!
positive_comment: La camera luminosa e molto spaziosa, ben arredata e con colori chiari. La posizione: il quartiere Lend è molto vivace, bei negozi e locali, praticamente in centro.
negative_comment: Nulla

title: Perfetto
positive_comment: Bella stanza, grande e confortevole. Posizione centralissima. Colazione ottima anche se poca scelta di pezzi dolci. Volendo c’è il parcheggio sotterraneo a 5 minuti a piedi a 15 euro al giorno con la tariffa dell’hotel.
negative_comment: Niente

title: Ottimo soggiorno a Graz
positive_comment: Le stanze pulite e confortevoli, personale gentile e disponibile, ottima colazione, la posizione vicinissima al centro,  il parcheggio di pertinenza della struttura.

title: Buon hotel
positive_comment: Hotel in zona centrale e comoda. Niente di cui lamentarmi
negative_comment: Tutto perfetto

positive_comment: Très bon emplacement dans la vieille ville, belle chambre et petit déjeuner très bon!

title: Graz a une ambiance très festive grâce aux  jeunes et une vielle ville animée !
positive_comment: L'aspect médiéval de la vielle ville et l'emplacement idéal de l'hôtel  dans les ruelles
negative_comment: Les ruelles pourraient être plus éclairées la nuit ...l''hôtel devrait être mieux indiqué donc plus facile à trouver !

positive_comment: Accueil bien et bon buffet de petit-déjeuner. Chambre confortable

title: Romantique dans un décors de charme
positive_comment:
Chambre très grande de charme bien placée dans le quartier historique.
Petit déjeuné copieux et varié, personnel accueillant et serviable. 
Ambiance époque impériale :)
negative_comment: Rien, une très bonne surprise avec de nombreux détails

title: Parfaite et confortable adresse au coeur de la vieille ville
positive_comment: Excellente situation dans la vieille ville. Chambres très confortables dans une ancienne maison rénovée avec goût. Personnel très agréable. Très bon petit déjeuner.

title: on y retournera
positive_comment: L’emplacement super central, la chambre spacieuse le personnel très très prévenant

title: Bon séjour
positive_comment: Le personnel était très agréable très bon accueil, le petit déjeuner très bien
negative_comment: Ras

title: Très bon séjour à Graz
positive_comment:
Super emplacement à peine à 5 minutes du centre ville, personnel à l'écoute et disponible, chambre (avec kitchenette) sous les toits, en étage comme demandé, avec machine expresso (le top), super petit déjeuner.
Suite à un petit retard de chocolat chaud au petit déjeuner, notre conso du Mini bar (jus de fruit) a été offerte spontanément pour compensation, ce n'est pas comme ça dans tous les établissements.
negative_comment: Rien.

title: Hôtel superbe et emplacement optimal
positive_comment:
Formidable, rarement eu pour ce prix des prestations aussi bonnes. L’emplacement est en plein centre, mais dans une rue calme. La chambre que nous avions était vraiment très belle, très confortable avec une très belle vue. L’accueil est vraiment très efficace et agréable. L’hôtel propose un ticket à 22,50 € pour se garer dans un parking public à proximité.
Tout est pensé pour le confort et la tranquillité des clients. L’hôtel a du charme et les décorations réalisées avec goût.
negative_comment: Rien

title: 3 nuit sà Graz enjuin 2024
positive_comment:
Belle chambre, spacieuse et bien meublé, belle décoration/désign. Climatisation efficace; Bon accueil le premier soir. Personnel aimable et accueillant
Hôtel bien situé et au calme
Super petit déjeuner avec des oeufs cuits à la demande et des fruits frais
negative_comment: La porte de douche ne fermant pas très bien (salle de bains inondée...)

title: Best hotel in Graz
positive_comment:
Amazing location and setting on the slope of the Schlossberg. Staff are attentive and friendly and do their best to make your stay as comfortable as possible. 
I’ll always choose the Schlossberghotel when coming to Graz.
Marko greeted us at the reception upon our arrival and gave us all the necessary information. The breakfast was amazing.

title: Excellent value and very positive experience
positive_comment: Very well located, close to main attractions without being in the middle of the crowds. Staff was great and helpful. Looks like the rooms have been recently refurbished and everything looks fresh and pleasing. Breakfast was great. Would stay again for sure.
negative_comment: For the kind of value the hotel delivers I can't really pick anything.

positive_comment: Perfect location, great personnel, tasty breakfast. No dedicated hotel parking, but this issue was solved instantly by providing ticket to the nearest public garage.
negative_comment: Some may be surprised by the interesting interior decision (shower cabin and sink right in front of a bed) with no door between bathroom and bedroom zones. Not a problem for an individual traveller, but might be an inconvenience for some cases.

positive_comment:
Très bon accueil.
L'hôtesse nous a préparé un goulash et des sandwichs malgré l'heure tardive.(22h)
Hôtel propre et silencieux. Petit déjeuner bon , copieux et pour tous les goûts.

title: Hotel simple efficace et bien placé
positive_comment: Bon emplacement a 25min a pied du centre ville de Graz, prix correct pour la chambre, confort du lit et de la chambre en général.
negative_comment:
Le parking est pratique mais pas donné 16€/jour. Malgré tout il reste intéressant vu les tarifs des parking de la ville. C'est à peine plus cher si vous arrivez tôt à l'hôtel.
Malheureusement nous avons eu des voisins peu discrets qui ont fait du bruit jusqu'à minuit

positive_comment: Le personnel est aimable. La chambre est équipée d'un lit et d'un plan de travail, tous les deux spacieux. De l'eau fraiche et de la citronnade sont mis à disposition à l'accueil.
negative_comment:
La salle de bain est exiguë et ne possède aucune étagère pour poser ses affaires.
Nous avions une chambre pour deux personnes. Malheureusement, celle-ci ne possédait qu'une seule chaise en intérieure et le balcon n'était équipé lui aussi que d'une seule chaise et d'aucune table.
La chambre mériterait d'être aménagée avec plus de mobiliers et d'une bouilloire.

title: Simple et efficace
positive_comment: Un hôtel de passage simple et efficace pour aller en Croatie.  Bien entretenu,  un très bon petit déjeuner.  Place de parking facile et pratique.
negative_comment: Attention,  pas de service du soir.  Il faut prévoir un resto en dehors de l hôtel.

title: Établissement sympathique, je le recommande
positive_comment: Literie très confortable, accueil réception très bien, petit déjeuner varié.
negative_comment: Manque dans la chambre un réfrigérateur et penderie petite.

title: Très belle hôtel et très bon moment pour le petit déjeuner 🙏
positive_comment: Le personnel de la réception du matin et surtout pour le personnel du petit déjeuner, super professionnel et très gentil et attentionné avec les clients 👍🤗
negative_comment:
A notre arrivée, le lit de notre fille n'était pas fait, le réceptionniste nous a informé qu'il il y avait tout pour le faire...
Je lui ai demandé  gentiment de le faire faire, nous voulions dîner au restaurant , il était fermé, nous avons demandé de commander au alentour de 20h00 des snacks, il n'avait rien impossible !
Nous sommes alors aller passer une commande, extérieur à l'hôtel que nous avons reçu à 23h00, la cerise sur le gâteau, il manquait une serviette de bain, le réceptionniste nous à demander de venir nous même la chercher car il n'avait pas le temps, je suis descendu à la réception pour récupérer ma commande, il discuter avec son collègue !

title: excellent séjour
positive_comment: personnel accueillant, chambre spacieuse, petit déjeuner
negative_comment: la chambre trop austère, manquent de chaleur.

positive_comment: L'endroit est propre et le personnel très acceuillant.
negative_comment: Rien.  Tout était parfait

positive_comment: Accueil agréable. Une chambre très confortable avec beaucoup d'espace et grand balcon.
negative_comment: Rien

positive_comment:
Ľemplacement 
Le calme 
Les magasins alimentaires,ex:Lidl et billa
negative_comment: On a vue que ils ont fait des travaux, il y a pas longtemps car il y avait encore des traces

title: Muy bueno
positive_comment: Muy lindo hotel con una terraza con vistas increíbles!!!

title: Cool hotel, well situated with wonderful facilities.
positive_comment: The room was exceptional, large wth an amazing shower and botanical products to use. The original art is a nice touch. The property is well situated and right next to the funicular that will take you up to Schlossberg fortress. I didn't get to use the pool as the weather was still mild. I'll definitely stay here again.

title: Beautiful hotel, would definitely go back
positive_comment: Beautiful hotel, loved all the art and the room was really comfortable, great shower, slept well 🙂
negative_comment: Breakfast is in the cafe (not included) but we didn't know we had to book a table, as the cafe is open to the public. There should be some seats automatically reserved for hotel guests.

title: Cosy modern, efficient and friendly hotel
positive_comment:
Very modern friendly and efficient 
Management and young staff were exceptionally efficient and friendly.
Loved the cafe, à la carte breakfast and opportunity to mix with locals.
negative_comment: Modernity, in some instances, was prioritised over practicality.”

title: Absolutely great stay!
positive_comment: We absolutely loved our stay here! We travelled with our dog and the hotel was super accomodating with everything. The room was spacious and the bed was amazing. The breakfast was an added bonus, lovely dishes and we both enjoyed it so much. The terrace on the roof was our favorite spot: with an elderflower soda we sat up here and watched the sunset. Absolutely would stay here again when we come back. Location wise it is right around the corner of the entrance to the Schlossberg, where you can take the elevator (small charge) or stairs up for lovely city views.

title: Top Lage, top Service, außergewöhnliches Ambiente!
positive_comment:
Die Lage des Hotels ist top-direkt in der Innenstadt/Altstadt; alles gut zu Fuß erreichbar!

Das Frühstück a la carte war sehr gut, sehr liebevoll zubereitet und das Service ist außergewöhnlich!
Wir wollten eine Kaffeemaschine aufs Zimmer-alles kein Problem!

Das Hotel ist sehr schön und sauber, auch das Zimmer hat uns überrascht!

title: A lovely boutique style hotel with lovely staff
positive_comment: It was lovely. Very comfortable and full of character. A perfect place to stay in Graz
negative_comment: It could have had a fireplace in the main lounge but that’s being very very picky! I am trying to find fault when there was none.

negative_comment: Expensive parking, only a few free city parking spots. One night from 6pm until 11am in paid parking spot below shopping center next door was 20€.

positive_comment: Very friendly staff, great location with excellent view, breakfast was very good

positive_comment: Totaly worth the money.. its really calm and chill place..ill be back when visiting Graz

title: A perfect choice for a one-night stopover during a journey.
positive_comment: The check-in was easy and quick. The room was modern, fairly large and clean. The breakfast was plentiful, buffet-style. There was a free parking space for the car in the yard.  The Wi-Fi was stable, fast, and easy to use.
negative_comment: There was no air conditioning in the room, but there was a fan instead. The window did not open directly onto the main road, but the noise could still be heard through the window that was kept open because of the heat.

title: Ideal for a basic nights rest after long drive.
positive_comment: It is the second time that we've chosen a hotel that is annex to an asian restaurant to our full satisfaction. We experienced basic lodgings but exactly what we need for a nights rest after driving for about 1000km including a basic but full breakfast.

title: Over average
positive_comment:
Very close to autoway so it was very good for us to give a break. 

Personnel are very helpful and cozy 

Room is very clean
negative_comment: There is not a refrigator and air condition in the room

positive_comment: Clean,  all  bathroom facilities , tasty dinner and good breakfast
negative_comment: On booking we saw that all taxes are including in price for night, also breakfast for free, but on registration desc we should pay City taxes 5 eur for 2 persons for 1 night, it's not a problem,but information on booking is wrong, that's why we are angry. Parking free it's also good

title: Overall it was good.
positive_comment: All was fine, meets the expectation for the price and the amount I've paid. Of course it is not a Hilton, but the price also reflects it. Good value for your money.
negative_comment: The breakfast could be a bit better, there are not much to choose from, but still fine.

title: Perfect for a cheap hotel with breakfast! Would totally recommend!
positive_comment: Nice bright room, comfy bed, nice shower and good Chinese buffet restaurant downstairs
negative_comment: The room was a bit hot

title: Excellent choice
positive_comment:
Very good
Stuff is very pleasure and good
Breakfast is fresh and nice.
negative_comment: I expected hairdrier integrated in bathrom.

positive_comment: What I would really place as an advantage at first is that there is possibility for late check-in if you let the office know soon enough and second the location of the place is on the crossing of the two main highways, so you don't have to drive any far from the Exit in order to get quickly on the road the next day. Well recommend for short stay.

title: Good value for money.
positive_comment: The room balcony. The staff was very accommodating and helpful.
negative_comment: The automatic lights in the bathroom would turn off while in the shower. No fridge.

title: Good solution close to the city centre
positive_comment: Good hotel and friendly staff. Cosy room, close to the city centre.
negative_comment: I didn't have breakfast as it was far too expensive. Room misses some amenities (e.g. tea pot).

positive_comment: The room was very large and clean. The breakfast was perfect cool like a Turkish breakfast,in fact more than Turkish breakfast:)The staffs were friendly and very helpfull.
negative_comment: The location was the only negative thing for that hotel in Graz. İt takes about 30 minutes on foot to the city center. We took a tram to the city center. The tram stop was only 5 minutes walk to the hotel

title: Comfortable Room and Good Breakfast
positive_comment: The room was spacious, warm, and very comfortable, with a large bathroom. The breakfast catered to all dietary preferences, offering a wide variety of tasty options.
negative_comment: Sound insulation was limited

title: More than sure I will come again to the same hotel given the opportunity !!!
positive_comment: The breakfast was good value for money regarding it's price and with plenty of options and enough time given from 7:00-10:30. The receptionists made me feel like home and made the experience unforgettable!!! The room was being cleaned daily without me having to ask for it !!! Pretty close to the city center and with enough places for you to grab something you might have needed (Supermarkets etc.)

title: It was good for a one night stay.
positive_comment: The staff was very nice, the room was big and comfortable.
negative_comment: The water pressure in the shower was not really great, also the was water is very hot or very cold, no inbetween unfortunately.

positive_comment: helpful stuff, everything clean and nice looking design
negative_comment: they don't have kettles:(

Excellent hotel a short distance away from the tram.

negative_comment: We have ordered room for 5 people (two adults and three kids, youngest 6) and received two rooms with total 4 beds. Otherwise all was fine.

positive_comment:
Desayuno  excelente .ubicación regular.
Atención bienvenida.
Excelente calidad-precio. Habitaciones amplias, muy cómodas, baños perfectos. Muy buena opción en Graz.
Instalaciones muy buenas, ducha, camas, etc. Personal agradable y parquing muy cómodo.
negative_comment: Un poco alejado del centro, pero se respira tranquilidad.

positive_comment:
Tipico hotel ibis, limpio, moderno. 
Como era fin de semana deje el auto gratis en la calle donde hay muchos lugares libres. A unos 200 mts, sobre una avenida, habia estacionamiento gratis todos los dias.
Esta retirado del centro.
La habitacion era muy amplia y limpieza 10 puntos.
Un hotel funcional y tranquilo. Buen desayuno. Personal amable.

title: Buen hotel para visitar Graz
positive_comment: El diseño, el tamaño de la habitación y el confort de la cama. Muy limpio, el baño muy nuevo y ducha grande.

title: Bellissimo, come sempre Graz non delude mai.
positive_comment: L’hotel è in una posizione eccellente. Lo staff è molto preparato e accogliente. La camera era pulita, ampia e silenziosa. La colazione è  eccezionale e offre scelte per qualsiasi tipo di esigenza. Il cortile rialzato con piscina e vista sul centro è insuperabile! Se si ha voglia di un drink o di uno snack anche a tarda sera, il bar è sempre aperto.
negative_comment: Niente da dire

title: Lovely hotel in lovely city.
positive_comment: Il letto super comodo. Ho adorato lo stile dell'hotel e la pulizia.
negative_comment: Nulla.

positive_comment: Colazione ottima. Posizione centralissima. Memorabilia automobilismo interessante.

title: Ottimo hotel nel centro città .
positive_comment: Belli gli spazi interni arredati con gusto ! Camere spaziose e molto pulite ! Ottima la posizione in centro città .
Personale con la massima disponibilità e cortesia, stanza super silenziosa, comodissima, molto ampia, pulitissima. Piscina e spa aperti h24. Top!
Tutto. È la terza volta che ci ritorno, la posizione sicuramente perfetta per visitare il centro, ma scelgo questo hotel per la cura in tutte le cose, dagli arredi al personale.
negative_comment: L’attenzione ai dettagli, la disponibilità del personale.Particolarmente apprezzate  le opere d’arte esposte e la vista che si ha dagli appartamenti

title: È la seconda volta che scegliamo questo albergo, posizione ottima, parcheggio ma sopratutto una struttura curata in ogni
positive_comment: Tutto. Ci hanno fatto un upgrade e abbiamo soggiornato in un appartamento con una vista spettacolare sopra il Mur.

Staff gentile e molto attento ai bisogni degli ospiti
Ci siamo sentiti accolti come fossimo degli amici, invece che dei semplici clienti
In camera un biglietto di benvenuto e una ciotola di ceramiche, per far dissetare la nostra amica a 4 zampe, e un sacchettino di biscottini per accoglierla
Colazione con grande varietà, prodotti freschi ed eccellenti.
Camera spaziosa, silenziosa e a due passi dal centro
Particolarmente interessante l'arredamento, i quadri e le sculture che valorizzano la struttura

Struttura semplicemente al top!
